## [0.50.2] ÔÇö 2026-04-25

### Changed
- **`~/.geode/auth.json` Ôćĺ `~/.geode/auth.toml` ŰőĘýŁ╝ SOT ÝćÁÝĽę** ÔÇö v0.50.0ýŁ┤ ŰĆäý×ůÝĽť `auth.toml` Plan/Profile ýśüŕÁČ ýáÇý×ąýćîŕ░Ç OAuth ÝćáÝü░ŕ╣îýžÇ ÝŁíýłśÝĽęŰőłŰőĄ. `oauth_login.py`ýŁś `_save_auth_store` / `_load_auth_store`ŕ░Ç Űé┤ŰÂÇýáüýť╝Űíť `auth.toml`Űíť ŰŁ╝ýÜ░ÝîůŰÉęŰőłŰőĄ (ÝśŞýÂť ýőťŕĚŞŰőłý▓śŰŐö ÝśŞÝÖś ýťáýžÇ). `~/.geode/auth.json`ýŁ┤ Ű░ťŕ▓ČŰÉśŰę┤ ÝĽť Ű▓ł ýŁŻýľ┤ OAUTH_BORROWED Plan + Profile ýîŹýť╝Űíť Ű│ÇÝÖśÝĽť ŰĺĄ `auth.json.migrated.bak`ýť╝Űíť ý×ÉŰĆÖ Ű░▒ýŚůÝĽęŰőłŰőĄ. (`core/gateway/auth/oauth_login.py`)
- **OAuth Plan ÝĹťÝśä** ÔÇö GEODEŕ░Ç ýžüýáĹ Ű░ťŕŞëÝĽť device-code OAuthŰŐö `kind = "oauth_borrowed"`, `provider = "openai-codex"`, plan id = `openai-codex-geode`Űíť ýáÇý×ąŰÉęŰőłŰőĄ. ýÖŞŰÂÇ Codex CLI(`~/.codex/auth.json`)ŰŐö ýŁ┤ýáäŕ│╝ ŰĆÖýŁ╝ÝĽśŕ▓î `managed_by="codex-cli"` ProfileŰíť read-only Ű»ŞŰčČŰÉęŰőłŰőĄ.

### Fixed
- **ýŁ┤ýĄĹ SOT Ýś╝ŰĆÖ ýáťŕ▒░** ÔÇö pre-v0.50.0 ýőťýáłýŁś `auth.json`ýŁ┤ v0.50.0 `auth.toml` ŰĆäý×ů ÝŤäýŚÉŰĆä ý×öýí┤ÝĽ┤ýäť `/login` dashboardŕ░Ç ŰĹÉ ÝîîýŁ╝ýŁä ŰĆÖýőťýŚÉ ý░Şýí░ÝĽśŰŹś Ű»ŞýäŞ Ű▓äŕĚŞŕ░Ç ÝĽ┤ýćîŰÉęŰőłŰőĄ. ÝĽť Ű▓ł ŰžłýŁ┤ŕĚŞŰáłýŁ┤ýůś ÝŤä `auth.toml`Űžî SOTŰíť ýéČýÜę.

## [0.50.1] ÔÇö 2026-04-25

### Added
- **`manage_login` agentic tool** ÔÇö natural-language access to the unified `/login` command. Supports the same subcommands as the slash command (`status`, `add`, `oauth`, `set-key`, `use`, `route`, `remove`, `quota`, `help`). Returns a structured snapshot (plans, profiles, routing) so the LLM can reason about credential state without re-rendering the Rich dashboard. (`core/tools/definitions.json`, `core/cli/tool_handlers.py`)
- **Safety/policy registration** ÔÇö `manage_login` is in `WRITE_TOOLS`, blocked for sub-agents (`SUBAGENT_DENIED_TOOLS`), excluded from auto-recovery (`error_recovery._EXCLUDED_TOOLS`), denied for read-only profiles, and emits an HITL approval card with `subcommand`/`args` summary. (`core/agent/safety_constants.py`, `core/agent/sub_agent.py`, `core/agent/error_recovery.py`, `core/tools/policy.py`, `core/agent/approval.py`)

### Changed
- **`set_api_key` and `manage_auth` tool descriptions** ÔÇö both now point users (and the model) at `manage_login` as the preferred path. Approval denial messages updated to reference `/login` instead of the legacy `/key` and `/auth` commands.

## [0.50.0] ÔÇö 2026-04-25

### Added
- **Plan + ProviderSpec credential model** ÔÇö first-class `Plan` entity with `PlanKind` (PAYG / SUBSCRIPTION / OAUTH_BORROWED / CLOUD_PROVIDER), per-Plan endpoint binding, and optional `Quota(window_s, max_calls, model_weights)`. Built-in templates for GLM Coding Lite/Pro/Max. (`core/gateway/auth/plans.py`, `core/llm/registry.py`)
- **`/login` unified credentials command** ÔÇö replaces split `/key` + `/auth` + `/login` UX with a single dashboard + verb hierarchy modeled on Hermes (`hermes auth ...`) and Claude Code (`/login` / `/status`). Subcommands: `add` (interactive wizard), `oauth openai`, `set-key`, `use`, `route`, `remove`, `quota`, `status`. The bare `/login` shows a unified view of Plans + Profiles + Routing + OAuth credentials. (`core/cli/commands.py`)
- **`~/.geode/auth.toml` persistence** ÔÇö Plans and bound profiles survive process restarts in a single TOML file (0600 perms). First boot auto-migrates `.env` PAYG keys into PAYG plans. `GEODE_AUTH_TOML` env var redirects the path for testing/sandboxing. (`core/gateway/auth/auth_toml.py`)
- **Mascot plan line** ÔÇö startup brand block shows the active subscription quota: `Plan: GLM Coding Lite (used 23/80 ┬Ě 57 left ┬Ě resets 134m)`. Hidden when no quota-bearing plan is registered. (`core/cli/ui/mascot.py`)
- **`AuthError` + `ERROR_HINTS`** ÔÇö structured auth errors map to user-actionable hints (subscription upgrade URLs, `/login set-key` invocations, OAuth refresh prompts). Hermes `format_auth_error` pattern. (`core/gateway/auth/errors.py`)
- **Model-switch reason in IPC events** ÔÇö `MODEL_SWITCHED` events now surface the trigger (`rate_limit`, `auth_cross_provider`, `failure_escalation`) inline so users can tell quota exhaustion apart from auth errors at a glance. (`core/cli/ui/event_renderer.py`)

### Fixed
- **Anthropic sampling parameters on adaptive-thinking models** ÔÇö `claude-opus-4-7`, `claude-opus-4-6`, `claude-sonnet-4-6` rejected requests with `temperature` set ("temperature is deprecated for this model" Ôćĺ 400 BadRequest). Sampling parameters are now omitted on adaptive-thinking models per Anthropic's Opus 4.7 breaking change. `claude-opus-4-7` also registered for the context-management + compaction beta. Fixes the `/model` hot-swap to Opus 4.7. Source: https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/about-claude/models/whats-new-claude-4-7
- **Codex OAuth poisoning general OpenAI calls** ÔÇö Codex CLI OAuth was registered as `provider="openai"`, so `ProfileRotator.resolve("openai")` returned the Codex token for every GPT call. Codex tokens lack `model.request` scope on `api.openai.com`, causing 403 + slow API-key fallback. The provider variant is now `openai-codex` with its own endpoint (`chatgpt.com/backend-api/codex`). (`core/runtime_wiring/infra.py`, `core/llm/providers/codex.py`)
- **GLM Coding Plan endpoint** ÔÇö `GLM_BASE_URL` pointed at the metered PAYG endpoint (`api.z.ai/api/paas/v4`), so Coding Plan keys silently bypassed the subscription quota. Default flipped to `api.z.ai/api/coding/paas/v4`; PAYG endpoint preserved as `GLM_PAYG_BASE_URL`. (`core/config.py`, `core/llm/providers/glm.py`)
- **Dual ProfileStore drift** ÔÇö CLI (`/auth`) and runtime LLM dispatch held separate `ProfileStore` instances. Credentials added through `/auth add` were invisible to `ProfileRotator.resolve()`. Single singleton via `runtime_wiring.infra.ensure_profile_store()`. (`core/runtime_wiring/infra.py`, `core/cli/commands.py`)
- **Provider label fragmentation (`zhipuai` vs `glm`)** ÔÇö UI store used `provider="zhipuai"` while dispatch keyed off `provider="glm"`. Profile rotator could never find UI-added GLM keys. Normalized to `glm`. (`core/cli/commands.py`)
- **`MODEL_PROFILES` mislabel** ÔÇö `gpt-5.4-mini` was advertised as `Codex (Plus)` even though it routes to plain `openai` (PAYG). Users believed they were on the Plus subscription while being billed metered. Now labeled `OpenAI`. (`core/cli/commands.py`)

### Changed
- **Cross-provider auto-escalation disabled for `glm` and `openai-codex`** ÔÇö `CROSS_PROVIDER_FALLBACK["glm"]` and `["openai-codex"]` are now empty. A GLM Coding Plan auth error no longer silently diverts traffic to a metered OpenAI key. Cross-plan jumps will return as an explicit user-confirmed action in a future release. (`core/llm/adapters.py`)
- **`/key` and `/auth` are aliases that surface the unified `/login` dashboard** ÔÇö bare `/key` redirects to `/login`. Setting an API key still works (`/key sk-...`) and now also seeds a PAYG plan into the registry so the credential is visible in `/login`.

### Architecture
- **Provider variant registry** ÔÇö `core/llm/registry.py` introduces `ProviderSpec(id, display_name, default_base_url, auth_type, extra_headers_factory)` modeled on Hermes' `ProviderConfig`. Five variants registered: `anthropic`, `openai`, `openai-codex`, `glm`, `glm-coding`. The Codex variant carries the Cloudflare-bypass header factory.
- **`AuthProfile.plan_id`** ÔÇö additive FK linking a profile to a Plan. `base_url_override` allows per-profile endpoint overrides (China-mainland mirrors etc.). Backward compatible ÔÇö env-loaded profiles default to a synthetic PAYG Plan.

## [0.49.1] ÔÇö 2026-04-23

### Infrastructure
- Added repo hygiene ratchet ÔÇö CI blocks PRs introducing dangling symlinks, absolute-path symlinks, or orphan `.claude/worktrees/` entries missing `.owner` metadata (`scripts/check_repo_hygiene.py`, wired into the `lint` job).
- Removed stale tracked `.owner` at repo root (accidentally committed via 6d07637) and added `/.owner` to `.gitignore` so the worktree ownership convention in CLAUDE.md ┬ž0 no longer pollutes feature branches.

## [0.49.0] ÔÇö 2026-04-23

### Architecture
- **Approval workflow extraction** ÔÇö HITL approval logic extracted from `tool_executor.py` to `agent/approval.py`. SRP improvement (#750)
- **Hook interceptor/feedback pattern** ÔÇö TOOL_EXEC hooks upgraded to interceptor pattern with aggressive recovery wiring (#751)
- **Adapter base classes** ÔÇö `BaseNotificationAdapter` (Slack/Discord/Telegram), `BaseCalendarAdapter` (Google/Apple), `BasePoller` infra consolidation. ~200ýĄä ýĄĹŰ│Á ýáťŕ▒░ (#731)
- **OAuth credential cache** ÔÇö `CredentialCache` class extracts shared TTL+mtime cache pattern from 2 OAuth readers (#731)
- **Provider key resolution** ÔÇö `resolve_provider_key()` centralizes ProfileRotator lookup (#731)
- **Scoring constants** ÔÇö `scoring_constants.py` single source of truth for tier thresholds, weights, confidence multiplier (#731)

### Added
- **Tool hook matcher** ÔÇö `register(matcher="run_bash|terminal")` regex ÝîĘÝä┤ýť╝Űíť ÝĽŞŰôĄŰčČŕ░Ç ÝŐ╣ýáĽ ŰĆäŕÁČýŚÉŰžî Ű░śýŁĹ. 3ŕ░ÇýžÇ ÝŐŞŰŽČŕ▒░ Ű¬ĘŰôť Ű¬ĘŰĹÉ ýžÇýŤÉ (#759)
- **`TOOL_EXEC_FAILED` event** ÔÇö ŰĆäŕÁČ ýőĄÝľë ýőĄÝîĘ ýőťýŚÉŰžî Ű░ťÝÖöÝĽśŰŐö ýáäýÜę observer hook. error, error_type, recoverable ÝĆČÝĽĘ (#759)
- **`TOOL_RESULT_TRANSFORM` event** ÔÇö TOOL_EXEC_END ŕ┤ÇýŞíŕ│╝ ŰÂäŰŽČŰÉť ŕ▓░ŕ│╝ Ű│ÇÝÖś ýáäýÜę feedback hook. Hermes `transform_tool_result` ÝîĘÝä┤ (#759)
- **Claude Opus 4.7** ÔÇö ANTHROPIC_PRIMARY ýŐ╣ŕ▓ę. 1M context, $5/$25, ŕ│áÝĽ┤ýâüŰĆä Ű╣äýáä, task budgets. Fallback: opus-4-7Ôćĺopus-4-6Ôćĺsonnet-4-6 (#771)
- **Codex OAuth pipeline** ÔÇö proactive refresh (120s ýáä), 401 auto-refresh, credential scrubbing (`scrub.py`), ZAI profile Űô▒ŰíŁ (#763)
- **ProfileRotator wiring** ÔÇö `mark_success()`/`mark_failure()` LLM ÝśŞýÂť ý▓┤ýŁŞýŚÉ ýÖÇýŁ┤ýľ┤Űžü. 8ŕ░ť audit logger Ű╣äŰîÇý╣ş ÝĽ┤ýćî (#765)
- **`geode skill` CLI** ÔÇö `list`/`create`/`show`/`remove` + 3-tier visibility (`public`/`private`/`unlisted`) (#767)
- **GLM-5.1 model** ÔÇö Z.AI GLM-5.1 (SWE-Bench Pro 1ýťä, MIT) ýÂöŕ░Ç Ű░Ć GLM_PRIMARY ýŐ╣ŕ▓ę. GLM-5V-Turbo, GLM-5-Turbo ŕ░Çŕ▓ę ŕ░▒ýőá (#729)
- **`geode doctor slack`** ÔÇö Slack Gateway 7-point diagnostic (env, token, scopes, bindings, serve, MCP, socket). CLI + natural language tool (#57)
- **Slack App Manifest URL** ÔÇö `get_manifest_url()` ýŤÉÝü┤ŰŽş ýĽ▒ ýâŁýä▒ URL
- **OSS compliance files** ÔÇö NOTICE, CONTRIBUTING.md (DCO), CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md, SECURITY.md, Issue/PR templates, .env.example (#744)
- **OSS templates** ÔÇö `docs/progress.md` kanban, `docs/plans/TEMPLATE.md`, `docs/workflow.md`, `.geode/skills/TEMPLATE.md` (#746)

### Fixed
- **GLM auth infinite retry** ÔÇö `classify_llm_error()` now handles OpenAI SDK exceptions (was Anthropic-only). Auth errors trigger immediate cross-provider escalation instead of cycling within same provider (#740)
- **Model escalation Ôćö settings sync** ÔÇö `_persist_escalated_model()` prevents `_sync_model_from_settings()` from reverting escalation (#740)
- **BashTool cwd** ÔÇö defaults to `get_project_root()` (user's workspace) instead of GEODE install path (#748)
- **LLM client resource leaks** ÔÇö `try/finally` + `close()` for OpenAI/Anthropic clients in `llm_extract_learning.py` (#731)
- **CI flaky test** ÔÇö `test_select_by_number` now sets initial model explicitly (#740)

### Removed
- **Internal docs** ÔÇö `docs/progress.md` (kanban data), `docs/plans/` (32 planning docs), `docs/workflow.md` (internal scaffold), `docs/reports/` (5 completion reports) ÔÇö replaced with public templates (#744)
- **Personal skills** ÔÇö job-hunter, expense-tracker, youtube-planner, daily-briefing, weekly-retro, slack-digest (#744)

### Infrastructure
- **.gitignore guardrails** ÔÇö blocks personal skills, memory, scaffold harness, temporary artifacts from being committed (#746)

## [0.48.0] ÔÇö 2026-04-11

### Added
- **Hook interceptor pattern** ÔÇö `trigger_interceptor()` method with block/modify chain semantics. Hooks can now block execution (`{"block": True}`) or modify event data (`{"modify": {...}}`), transitioning from pure observer to observer + interceptor. Per-hook timeout via `ThreadPoolExecutor`
- **6 new HookEvents (49 Ôćĺ 55)**: `USER_INPUT_RECEIVED` (interceptor-capable), `TOOL_EXEC_START/END` (tool execution observability), `COST_WARNING/LIMIT_EXCEEDED` (cost guard at 80%/100%), `EXECUTION_CANCELLED` (cancel audit trail)
- **Session cost guard** ÔÇö `cost_limit_usd` config field. Fires `COST_WARNING` at 80% and `COST_LIMIT_EXCEEDED` at 100% of budget

### Fixed
- **Sandbox hardening** ÔÇö 4 crash/safety fixes:
  - `path.resolve()` OSError defense in `add/remove_working_directory()`
  - macOS `/private/var` regex: `r"^/private/var/"` Ôćĺ `r"^/private/var(/|$)"` ÔÇö trailing slash no longer required
  - `_additional_dirs` thread safety with `threading.Lock` ÔÇö concurrent sub-agent safety
  - Symlink LRU cache removed ÔÇö prevents stale resolution in long-running sessions

### Fixed
- **Slack poller message loss on processing failure** ÔÇö ts was updated BEFORE processing, so if LLM call failed mid-batch, remaining messages were permanently skipped. Now uses deferred-ts pattern: advance only AFTER successful processing, break on failure for retry next cycle
- **Slack app mention not detected** ÔÇö `<@A...>` (app mention format) was not matched by `_is_mentioned()` regex, causing `require_mention=true` channels to silently ignore app mentions. Added `A` to the `[UBA]` character class in both `_is_mentioned` and `_strip_mentions`

### Added
- **Lazy directory creation** ÔÇö `ensure_directories()` in `core/paths.py` creates all `~/.geode/` and `.geode/` directories at bootstrap. Follows Claude Code's lazy `mkdir(recursive)` pattern. Fresh `uv run geode` on clean install now works without manual setup
- `.gitignore` auto-entry for `.geode/` on first run

### Architecture
- **Layer violation fix (3 cross-layer dependency violations resolved)**:
  - `agentic_response.py` moved from `core/cli/` (L5) Ôćĺ `core/llm/` (L2) ÔÇö eliminates L2ÔćĺL5 import in LLM providers/router. `core/cli/agentic_response.py` retained as backward-compatible re-export
  - `MODEL_PRICING` dead re-export removed from `core/config.py` ÔÇö eliminates L1ÔćĺL2 import (no callers used `core.config.MODEL_PRICING`)
  - `RightsRiskResult`, `RightsStatus`, `LicenseInfo` moved from `core/verification/` (L3) Ôćĺ `core/state.py` (L1) ÔÇö eliminates L1ÔćĺL3 import. `rights_risk.py` re-exports from `core.state`
- **ContextVar thread propagation fix** ÔÇö `invoke_with_timeout()` ThreadPoolExecutorýŚÉ `contextvars.copy_context()` ýÂöŕ░Ç. graph nodeýŚÉýäť memory/profile/domain adapterŕ░Ç NoneýŁ┤ ŰÉśŰŹś CRITICAL race condition ýłśýáĽ
- **Hook deduplication** ÔÇö `HookSystem.register()` name ŕŞ░Ű░ś ýĄĹŰ│Á Ű░ęýžÇ. explicit + filesystem discovery ýŁ┤ýĄĹ Űô▒ŰíŁ ÝĽ┤ýćî
- **LLM router decomposition** ÔÇö `adapters.py` (355ýĄä, Protocol 7ŕ░ť + ClaudeAdapter + resolve_agentic_adapter) + `provider_dispatch.py` (269ýĄä, retry/circuit breaker/cross-provider) ýÂöýÂť. router.py 1530Ôćĺ1062ýĄä (-31%)

### Added
- **Sandbox validation module (Claude Code parity)** ÔÇö `core/tools/sandbox.py` ýĄĹýĽÖ Ű¬ĘŰôł ýőáýäĄ. 14/15 GAP ÝĽ┤ýćî:
  - Shell expansion blocking ($VAR, ${VAR}, $(cmd), %VAR%, ~user) ÔÇö TOCTOU prevention
  - Dangerous file/directory blocking (.gitconfig, .bashrc, .git/, .claude/) ÔÇö write only
  - Symlink chain resolution with intermediate validation + lru_cache memoize
  - macOS path normalization (/private/var Ôćö /var, /private/tmp Ôćö /tmp bilateral)
  - Glob pattern blocking in write operations
  - Session-scoped additional working directories API (add/remove)
  - ReadDocumentTool offset/limit + file size guard (256KB pre-read, 25K token post-read)
  - Sandbox settings externalization (config.toml [sandbox] section)
  - Configurable limits for glob/grep results
  - Sub-agent working directory isolation

## [0.47.1] ÔÇö 2026-04-07

### Added
- **Max jobs 50 ýáťÝĽť** ÔÇö `add_job()` ýâüÝĽť ý▓┤ÝüČ. ŰČ┤ÝĽť job ýâŁýä▒ Ű░ęýžÇ (claude-code MAX_JOBS ÝîĘÝä┤)
- **Lock session identity** ÔÇö `SchedulerLock`ýŚÉ `session_id` ýÂöŕ░Ç. serve restart ýőť ŕ░ÖýŁÇ ýäŞýůśýŁ┤Űę┤ ýŽëýőť lock ý×ČýĚĘŰôŁ (idempotent re-acquire)
- **Recurring age-out** ÔÇö 30ýŁ╝ ýžÇŰéť recurring job ý×ÉŰĆÖ ýéşýáť + `permanent` flag Űę┤ýáť. stale job Űłäýáü Ű░ęýžÇ
- **Sub-agent scheduler routing** ÔÇö `ScheduledJob.agent_id` ÝĽäŰôť + `OnJobFired` 4-arg callback. sub-agentŰ│ä job ýćîýťá Ű░Ć fire ŰŁ╝ýÜ░Ýîů

### Architecture
- **AgenticLoop SRP decomposition** ÔÇö context window management extracted to `context_manager.py` (410 lines), convergence detection to `convergence.py` (114 lines). agentic_loop.py 1818 Ôćĺ 1405 lines (-23%)
- **CLI __init__.py module extraction** ÔÇö memory_handler, scheduler_drain, terminal extracted to dedicated modules. cli/__init__.py 1892 Ôćĺ 1641 lines (-13%)
- **Runtime.create() staged builders** ÔÇö monolithic 122-line factory split into 4 staged private methods (_build_core, _build_tools, _build_memory_and_automation)
- **Hook layer violation fix** ÔÇö auto_learn.py L6ÔćĺL5 dependency eliminated via profile_provider DI injection at bootstrap

### Fixed
- **FALLBACK_CROSS_PROVIDER hook never emitted** ÔÇö cross-provider model escalation now fires the dedicated observability hook with provider-level context
- **signal_adapter ContextVar encapsulation** ÔÇö added `get_signal_adapter()` public getter, replaced private `_signal_adapter_ctx.get()` access

## [0.47.0] ÔÇö 2026-04-07

### Added
- **Scheduler GAP-close (claude-code alignment)** ÔÇö 8 architectural gaps closed:
  - Project-local storage (`.geode/scheduled_tasks.json`) ÔÇö per-project isolation
  - O_EXCL lock + PID liveness probe ÔÇö cross-platform multi-session coordination
  - `on_job_fired` callback protocol ÔÇö decoupled from `queue.Queue`
  - Session-only tasks (`durable=False`) ÔÇö in-memory ephemeral scheduling
  - Deterministic per-job jitter (SHA-256 hash) ÔÇö thundering herd prevention
  - 1s check interval + mtime file watch ÔÇö responsive scheduling with external change detection
  - Missed task recovery ÔÇö AT/EVERY jobs recovered on startup with grace window
  - `create_scheduler()` factory ÔÇö library-style instantiation for any context
- **3 new test modules** ÔÇö `test_scheduler_lock.py`, `test_scheduler_jitter.py`, `test_scheduler_missed.py` (36 tests)

### Changed
- Scheduler default check interval 60s Ôćĺ 1s
- `SchedulerService` default `enable_jitter=True`
- Legacy `fcntl.flock` replaced with `SchedulerLock` (O_EXCL + PID probe)
- `action_queue: queue.Queue` deprecated in favor of `on_job_fired: Callable`

### Fixed
- **Sandbox project root CWD ŕŞ░Ű░śýť╝Űíť ýáäÝÖś** ÔÇö `_PROJECT_ROOT = Path(__file__).parent┬│` ÝĽśŰôťýŻöŰöę Ôćĺ `get_project_root()` (CWD ý║íý▓ś). ýÖŞŰÂÇ ýŤîÝüČýŐĄÝÄśýŁ┤ýŐĄýŚÉýäť `geode` ýőĄÝľë ýőť ÝîîýŁ╝ ŰĆäŕÁČŕ░Ç "path outside project directory" ýśĄŰąś Ű░ťýâŁÝĽśŰŹś Ű▓äŕĚŞ ýłśýáĽ. Claude Code `originalCwd` ÝîĘÝä┤ ýŁ┤ýőŁ

## [0.46.0] ÔÇö 2026-04-06

### Added
- **OpenAI Codex CLI OAuth ÝćáÝü░ ý×ČýéČýÜę** ÔÇö `~/.codex/auth.json`ýŚÉýäť OAuth ÝćáÝü░ ý×ÉŰĆÖ ŕ░ÉýžÇ. ChatGPT ŕÁČŰĆů Ű▓öýťä Űé┤ API ÝśŞýÂť (OpenAI ŕ│ÁýőŁ ÝŚłýÜę). ProfileRotator OAUTH > API_KEY ýÜ░ýäáýłťýťä
- **Computer-use ÝĽśŰäĄýŐĄ** ÔÇö PyAutoGUI ŕŞ░Ű░ś provider-agnostic desktop automation. Anthropic `computer_20251124` + OpenAI `computer_use_preview` ýľĹý¬Ż ýžÇýŤÉ. DANGEROUS HITL ýŐ╣ýŁŞ ÝĽäýłś
- **MCP tool result ÝćáÝü░ ŕ░ÇŰôť** ÔÇö `max_tool_result_tokens` 25000 ŕŞ░Ű│Şŕ░ĺ. Claude Code ÝîĘÝä┤ ýŁ┤ýőŁ (`mcpValidation.ts` 25K)
- **HTMLÔćĺMD Ű│ÇÝÖś** ÔÇö `markdownify` ŰĆäý×ů. web_fetch HTMLýŁä ŕÁČýí░ Ű│┤ýí┤ Markdownýť╝Űíť Ű│ÇÝÖśÝĽśýŚČ ÝćáÝü░ ÝÜĘýťĘ ŕ░ťýäá
- **Sandbox breadcrumb 3-layer** ÔÇö tool description ýáťýĽŻ Ű¬ůýőť + _check_sandbox hint + non-recoverable recovery skip
- **Insight quality gate** ÔÇö `_is_valid_insight()` 7ŕ░ť reject rule. PROJECT.md garbage Ű░ęýžÇ
- **HITL 3-point diagnostic logging** ÔÇö thin CLI/server/tool_executor ýáäý▓┤ approval ÝŁÉŰŽä ýžäŰőĘ ŰíťŕĚŞ
- **PR body ÝĽäýłś 4ýä╣ýůś ÝůťÝöîŰŽ┐** ÔÇö Summary/Why/Changes/Verification (CANNOT rule)
- **`/auth login` ýŁŞÝä░Ű×ÖÝő░ŰŞî ÝöîŰíťýÜ░** ÔÇö subprocessŰíť `claude login`/`codex login` ýžüýáĹ ýőĄÝľë. OAuth ýâüÝâť ÝĹťýőť

### Changed
- **Anthropic OAuth Ű╣äÝÖťýä▒ÝÖö** ÔÇö Anthropic 2026-01-09 ToS Ű│Çŕ▓Ż ŰîÇýŁĹ. Claude Code OAuth ý×ČýéČýÜęýŁÇ ýáĽý▒ů ýťäŰ░ś Ôćĺ API keyŰžî ýéČýÜę. ýŻöŰôť Ű│┤ýí┤ (ýáĽý▒ů Ű│Çŕ▓Ż ýőť ý×ČÝÖťýä▒ÝÖö ŕ░ÇŰŐą)
- **CLAUDE.md Ôćĺ GEODE.md ŰÂäŰŽČ** ÔÇö scaffold(CLAUDE.md) vs runtime(GEODE.md) ŕ┤ÇýőČýéČ ŰÂäŰŽČ
- **tool_offload_threshold 5000Ôćĺ15000** ÔÇö offload Ű╣łŰĆä ýáĽýâüÝÖö
- **web search timeout 30Ôćĺ60s** ÔÇö native tool ýŁĹŰőÁ ŰîÇŕŞ░ ýőťŕ░ä ÝÖĽŰîÇ

### Fixed
- **Python 3.14 prompt_toolkit crash** ÔÇö kqueue OSError. SelectSelector event loop policy ŕ░ĽýáťŰíť prompt_toolkit Ű│ÁýŤÉ (ÝĽťŕŞÇ ý×ůŰáą/history/backspace)

- **GLM context overflow ŕ░ÉýžÇ** ÔÇö `"Prompt exceeds max length"` (code 1261) ÝîĘÝä┤ ýÂöŕ░Ç. ýŽëýőť context_overflow ŰÂäŰąś Ôćĺ aggressive recovery
- **OAuth cache thread-safety** ÔÇö `threading.Lock`ýť╝Űíť _cache dict ŰĆÖýőť ýáĹŕĚ╝ Ű│┤ÝśŞ
- **web search 401** ÔÇö Codex OAuth ÝćáÝü░ýŁ┤ web_search ŕÂîÝĽť ýŚćýŁî. `_openai_search`ŕ░Ç API key ýžüýáĹ ýéČýÜę
- **ProfileStore Ű»Şŕ░▒ýőá** ÔÇö `/auth login` ÝŤä ýŽëýőť ProfileStore Ű░śýśü
- **CLAUDE.md + README.md ŰęöÝŐŞŰŽş ŰĆÖŕŞ░ÝÖö** ÔÇö Modules 195, Tests 3525+, Hooks 48, Tools 56 ÝćÁýŁ╝
- **Model switch breadcrumb** ÔÇö `/model` ýáäÝÖś ýőť ŰîÇÝÖöýŚÉ ýáäÝÖś Űžłý╗Ą ýú╝ý×ů
- **Haiku model switch 3-bug fix** ÔÇö beta header ýí░ŕ▒┤ŰÂÇ ýú╝ý×ů + context guard wire + overhead ýőĄýŞí
- **Haiku native tool 400** ÔÇö `allowed_callers=["direct"]` Ű»ŞýäĄýáĽ ýłśýáĽ
- **HITL IPC approval 5-bug fix** ÔÇö buf Ű»Şŕ░▒ýőá, stale response, tool_name, safety_level, ýŁ┤ýĄĹ ÝöäŰíČÝöäÝŐŞ

## [0.40.0] ÔÇö 2026-03-31

### Added
- **200K ýáłŰîÇ ÝćáÝü░ ŕ░ÇŰôť** ÔÇö 1M ý╗ĘÝůŹýŐĄÝŐŞ Ű¬ĘŰŹŞýŚÉýäť 200K ÝćáÝü░ ý┤łŕ│╝ ýőť rate limit pool ŰÂäŰŽČ Ű░ęýžÇ. ÝŹ╝ýä╝ÝŐŞ ŕŞ░Ű░ś ý×äŕ│äŕ░ĺ(80%=800K)ŕ│╝ Ű│äŕ░ťŰíť `ABSOLUTE_TOKEN_CEILING`ýŁ┤ tool result ýÜöýĽŻ Ôćĺ compact 2ŰőĘŕ│ä ýĽĽýÂĽ ýőĄÝľë
- **LLM ý╣ťÝÖöýáü ýŚÉŰčČ ŰęöýőťýžÇ** ÔÇö `tool_error()` ÝŚČÝŹ╝ + `classify_tool_exception()` ŰĆäý×ů. `error_type` (validation/not_found/permission/connection/timeout/dependency/internal), `recoverable` ÝöîŰ×śŕĚŞ, `hint`Űíť ŕÁČýí░ÝÖö. tool_executor, MCP, web_tools, document_tools, analysis tools ýáüýÜę
- **Graceful serve drain** ÔÇö SIGTERM/SIGINT ýőť 3-phase shutdown: `stop_accepting()` (ýâł ýŚ░ŕ▓░ ý░ĘŰőĘ) Ôćĺ `SessionLane.active_count` ÝĆ┤Űžü (30s timeout) Ôćĺ component shutdown. ýžäÝľë ýĄĹ ýäŞýůś ýÖäŰúî ŰîÇŕŞ░

## [0.39.0] ÔÇö 2026-03-31

### Added
- **IPC pipeline event parity** ÔÇö thin client now receives all pipeline data that direct CLI renders:
  - Signals (YouTube views, Reddit subscribers, FanArt YoY%) in `pipeline_gather` event
  - PSM causal inference (ATT%, Z-value, Rosenbaum Gamma) in `pipeline_score` event with significance indicators
  - Pipeline warnings/errors in `pipeline_result` event
  - Guardrail failure details in `pipeline_verification` event
- **ToolCallTracker.suspend()** ÔÇö erases rendered spinner lines and resets cursor position, preventing ANSI cursor-up from corrupting interleaved pipeline/stream output
- **Pipeline ip_name tagging** ÔÇö `set_pipeline_ip()` thread-local for forward-compatible parallel UI (Option B: IP-sequential queueing)
- **Gateway context overflow recovery** ÔÇö pre-call context check prevents 400 errors; auto-clear session on context exhaustion; i18n exhaustion messages via Haiku
- **CJK-aware tool tracker** ÔÇö `_truncate_display()` uses `unicodedata.east_asian_width` for correct CJK character width; spinner moved to left side

### Fixed
- **list_ips spinner duplication** ÔÇö `stop()` called per stream chunk reprinted spinner each time; now uses `suspend()` with position reset
- **analyze_ip spinner/panel collision** ÔÇö 9 pipeline event handlers changed from `_clear_activity_line()` to `_suppress_all_spinners()`, stopping tracker before writing
- **Rich Panel cursor-up interference** ÔÇö stale `_line_count` caused cursor-up to erase interleaved pipeline event output
- **400 error silent swallow** ÔÇö `call_with_failover` now re-raises context-overflow BadRequestError instead of returning None

### Removed
- **Stub insight generator** ÔÇö `PIPELINE_ENDÔćĺadd_insight` hook removed; generated broken `tier=?/score=0.00` entries because synthesizer input state didn't reliably contain scoring results. Pipeline results are recorded in journal (`runs.jsonl`) via JournalHook.

## [0.38.0] ÔÇö 2026-03-30

### Added
- **LLM Resilience Hardening** ÔÇö 14-item 3-phase plan fully implemented across Agentic Loop, Domain DAG, and shared LLM infrastructure:
  - **Backoff jitter** (C1) ÔÇö full jitter (`random.uniform`) replaces deterministic delay, preventing thundering herd.
  - **Cross-provider failover** (C1-b) ÔÇö `_cross_provider_dispatch()` in router.py; opt-in via `llm_cross_provider_failover`.
  - **Degraded fallback** (B1) ÔÇö retry-exhausted analyst/evaluator/scoring nodes return `is_degraded=True` results instead of crashing the pipeline.
  - **Pipeline timeout** (B3) ÔÇö `invoke_with_timeout()` with `PIPELINE_TIMEOUT` hook event. Config: `pipeline_timeout_s` (default 600s).
  - **Degraded scoring penalty** (B4) ÔÇö degraded sources proportionally reduce confidence in final score.
  - **Verification enrichment loop** (B5) ÔÇö guardrails/biasbuster failure triggers gather loopback (before confidence check).
  - **Evaluator partial retry** (B6) ÔÇö non-degraded evaluators skipped on re-iteration (mirrors analyst pattern).
  - **Iteration history trimming** (B7) ÔÇö custom reducer caps `iteration_history` at 10 entries.
  - **Fallback cost ratio** (C2) ÔÇö `llm_max_fallback_cost_ratio` filters expensive fallback models upfront.
  - **Error propagation** (B2) ÔÇö pipeline `state["errors"]` included in MCP caller output.
  - **Gather retryable** (B8) ÔÇö gather node added to `_RETRYABLE_NODES`.
  - **Cost budget hardening** (A2) ÔÇö specific exceptions, 80% proactive warning, hard termination.
  - **Checkpoint resume** (A3) ÔÇö `SessionCheckpoint` per-round save, auto-checkpoint before failures.
  - **Aggressive context recovery** ÔÇö continue loop after context exhaustion with summarize + halved-keep prune.
- **Error classification** ÔÇö `core/llm/errors.py`: typed error hierarchy (rate limit, auth, billing, context overflow) with severity + hint.
- **HookSystem 42 events** ÔÇö `FALLBACK_CROSS_PROVIDER` + `PIPELINE_TIMEOUT` (40 Ôćĺ 42).
- **Resilience test suite** ÔÇö 34 new tests covering all resilience scenarios.

### Fixed
- **Sequential tool rendering duplicates** ÔÇö `ToolCallTracker` accumulated completed entries across batches, causing stale lines (e.g. `sequentialthinking` showing duplicate spinner rows). Now clears previous batch on new batch start.

## [0.37.2] ÔÇö 2026-03-30

### Added
- **Persistent activity spinner** ÔÇö thin client shows animated `Working...` spinner from prompt send until result arrives. Thinking/tool spinners override it; resumes between events.
- **Pipeline client-side rendering** ÔÇö `panels.py` detects IPC mode Ôćĺ emits structured event + returns early (no duplicate raw ANSI stream). Thin client renders all pipeline milestones from structured events.
- **`pipeline_header` / `pipeline_result` events** ÔÇö 2 new event types (28 Ôćĺ 30 total).

### Fixed
- **Thinking spinner frozen** ÔÇö `EventRenderer` thinking spinner was rendering 1 frame then freezing until next event. Now uses daemon thread animation (80ms per frame), matching `ToolCallTracker` pattern.
- **Tool duration inaccurate** ÔÇö `tool_end` event now includes server-measured `duration_s`. Client prefers server duration over client-side measurement (excludes IPC transport latency).
- **`/model` hot-swap (P0)** ÔÇö `_apply_model()` now calls `loop.update_model()` on the active AgenticLoop. Model changes take effect immediately in the current IPC session without reconnecting.
- **`/quit` session cost (P1)** ÔÇö `/quit` and `/exit` now relay to serve instead of running locally. Session cost summary renders with real accumulator data from the serve process.

### Added
- **`--continue` / `--resume` (P2)** ÔÇö IPC resume protocol wired end-to-end. `geode --continue` resumes the most recent session; `geode --resume <id>` resumes a specific session. Checkpoint messages and model are restored into the conversation context.
- **IPC `resume` message type** ÔÇö CLIPoller handles `{"type": "resume"}` messages, loads checkpoint via `SessionCheckpoint`, and restores conversation context + loop session ID.
- **`IPCClient.request_resume()`** ÔÇö thin client method to request session resume from serve.
- **Event Schema V2 ÔÇö 16 new structured IPC events** expanding coverage from 12 Ôćĺ 28 event types:
  - AgenticLoop termination: `model_escalation`, `cost_budget_exceeded`, `time_budget_expired`, `convergence_detected`
  - AgenticLoop strategy: `goal_decomposition`, `tool_backpressure`, `tool_diversity_forced`
  - AgenticLoop lifecycle: `model_switched`, `checkpoint_saved`
  - Pipeline milestones: `pipeline_gather`, `pipeline_analysis`, `pipeline_evaluation`, `pipeline_score`, `pipeline_verification`
  - Pipeline control flow: `feedback_loop`, `node_skipped`
- **EventRenderer V2** ÔÇö client-side handlers for all 16 new events with ANSI rendering.

## [0.37.1] ÔÇö 2026-03-30

### Fixed
- **serve auto-start cwd** ÔÇö `start_serve_if_needed()` resolves GEODE project root via `__file__` path. Works from any directory.
- **sys.executable mismatch** ÔÇö `shutil.which("geode")` instead of `sys.executable` for subprocess spawn.
- **SessionMode.IPC quiet** ÔÇö `quiet=True` suppresses AgenticLoop UI on serve terminal; results via IPC JSON only.
- **Thin client UX** ÔÇö thinking spinner during prompt relay, status line (model/rounds/tools) after response, serve auto-start spinner.
- **tool_calls dict handling** ÔÇö CLIPoller handles both dict and object tool call formats.
- **auto-start timeout** ÔÇö 10s Ôćĺ 30s (MCP 13-server startup takes ~20s).

### Known Issues
- `/model` (interactive menu) requires terminal ÔÇö does not work in thin mode. Use `/model <name>` with explicit arg.

## [0.37.0] ÔÇö 2026-03-30

### Changed
- **Thin-only architecture** ÔÇö standalone REPL eliminated (~487 lines deleted). `geode` always connects to serve via IPC; auto-starts serve if not running. Single code path for all execution: CLI, Slack/Discord, Scheduler all route through `acquire_all(key, ["session", "global"])`.
- **SessionMode.IPC** ÔÇö new session mode for thin CLI client. `hitl=0` (WRITE allowed, DANGEROUS policy-blocked). Replaces `SessionMode.REPL` for IPC connections.
- **CLIPoller hardened** ÔÇö `acquire_all()` gating, `chmod 0o600` on Unix socket, `command` type in IPC protocol for slash command relay.
- **SessionLane ÔÇö per-key serialization** ÔÇö replaced 4-lane system (session/global/gateway/scheduler) with OpenClaw pattern: `SessionLane` (per-session-key `Semaphore(1)`) + `Lane("global", max=8)`. Same session key serializes, different keys parallel. `acquire_all(key, ["session", "global"])` unifies all execution paths. OpenClaw defect fixes: `max_sessions=256` cap, `cleanup_idle()` eviction.
- **Unified bootstrap** ÔÇö `serve()` no longer calls `bootstrap_geode()`. Uses `setup_contextvars()` + `GeodeRuntime.create()` directly. ONE HookSystem, ONE MCP manager, ONE SkillRegistry across all entry points. Resolves C1/C2/H1/H4/H5 from structural audit.

### Added
- **CLIChannel IPC** ÔÇö Unix domain socket (`~/.geode/cli.sock`) connects thin CLI client to `geode serve`. `CLIPoller` accepts local connections, creates REPL sessions via SharedServices. `IPCClient` auto-detects serve and delegates agentic execution over line-delimited JSON protocol. Fallback to standalone when serve is not running.
- **Scheduler in serve mode** ÔÇö `SchedulerService` extracted from REPL into `geode serve`. Scheduled jobs now fire in headless mode. Shared `_drain_scheduler_queue()` helper eliminates duplication between REPL and serve paths.
- **Lane.acquire_timeout()** ÔÇö blocking-with-timeout acquisition for Lane semaphores.
- **SessionLane class** ÔÇö per-key `Semaphore(1)`, `max_sessions=256`, idle cleanup at 300s.
- **Serve auto-start** ÔÇö background daemon spawn with pidfile lock. `geode` thin CLI auto-starts serve if not running.
- **IPC command type** ÔÇö slash command server-side relay via `command` type in IPC protocol.

### Fixed
- **C3: Dual Scheduler race** ÔÇö `fcntl.flock(LOCK_EX/LOCK_SH)` on `jobs.json` save/load. REPL and serve can no longer corrupt shared job store via concurrent file access.
- **H2: Scheduler Ôćĺ LaneQueue** ÔÇö replaced ad-hoc `Semaphore(2)` with `Lane.try_acquire()`/`manual_release()`. Scheduler concurrency now routes through the central LaneQueue system.
- **M2: Scheduler PolicyChain** ÔÇö `create_session(SCHEDULER/DAEMON)` filters DANGEROUS tools (`run_bash`, `delegate_task`). Headless modes can no longer invoke tools requiring HITL approval.
- **M3: Stuck job detection** ÔÇö `running_since_ms` field tracks active jobs. `detect_stuck_jobs()` runs each tick, marks jobs exceeding 10min threshold as `stuck`, fires hook.
- **TOCTOU race in start_serve_if_needed** ÔÇö pidfile lock prevents race between check and spawn.
- **Sub-agent depth guard** ÔÇö explicit `if depth >= max_depth` check replaces implicit gating.
- **Scheduler drain exception safety** ÔÇö lane slot leak on `create_session()` failure fixed. `main_loop.run()` exception no longer kills the drain loop. Init failure in serve promoted to `log.warning`.
- **P1 batch (5 fixes)** ÔÇö C3/C4 regression tests, WorkerRequest `time_budget_s` pass-through, thread-mode `denied_tools` raises (was warn), announce TTL reset (`setdefault` Ôćĺ assignment), subprocess env whitelist +2 vars.

### Removed
- **CoalescingQueue** ÔÇö 148 lines, no-op callback, 0 trigger rate. Removed entirely.
- **Standalone REPL `_interactive_loop`** ÔÇö ~487 lines eliminated. All execution routes through serve.
- **Gateway/scheduler named lanes** ÔÇö replaced by SessionLane per-key serialization.
- **IsolatedRunner internal Semaphore** ÔÇö replaced by `Lane("global", max=8)`.

### Architecture
- **6-Layer Ôćĺ 4-Layer Stack** ÔÇö Model Ôćĺ Runtime Ôćĺ Harness Ôćĺ Agent, with orthogonal Domain (`ÔŐą Domain`). Simplified from previous L0-L5 numbering.
- **M1: Config-driven pollers** ÔÇö `build_gateway()` reads `[gateway] pollers` from `config.toml`. Dynamic `_POLLER_REGISTRY` replaces hardcoded `register_poller()` calls. Default: all three (slack, discord, telegram).
- **19 legacy docs moved to archive** ÔÇö outdated architecture and plan documents relocated to `docs/archive/`.

## [0.35.1] ÔÇö 2026-03-29

### Fixed
- **C1: agentic_ref race** ÔÇö removed shared mutable `agentic_ref[0]` from SharedServices. Tool handlers now use `_current_loop_ctx` ContextVar (per-thread, no cross-session contamination). Scheduler can no longer corrupt REPL's loop pointer.
- **C2: TaskGraph thread safety** ÔÇö `threading.Lock` on `get_ready_tasks()`, `mark_running()`, `mark_completed()`, `mark_failed()`, `add_task()`. Prevents double-execution from concurrent state transitions.
- **C3: IsolatedRunner semaphore leak** ÔÇö semaphore release guarded by `acquired` flag. Timeout on `_acquire_slot` no longer leaks extra permits beyond `MAX_CONCURRENT`.
- **C4: LaneQueue acquire_all()** ÔÇö tracks acquired semaphores separately from active tracking. Partial failure only releases actually-acquired semaphores.
- **H1: Zombie thread cleanup** ÔÇö timeout threads removed from `_active`/`_cancel_flags` tracking.
- **H2: Announce double-publish** ÔÇö atomic check-and-set inside `_announce_lock`.
- **H3: Announce orphan TTL** ÔÇö 300s auto-expiry for stale queue entries.
- **H4: Subprocess env whitelist** ÔÇö 10 safe vars only (no full `os.environ` copy).
- **H8: TaskBridge evaluator lock** ÔÇö `_evaluator_lock` on counter increment.
- **M1: MODEL_SWITCHED duplicate** ÔÇö removed duplicate C7 handler registration.

### Changed
- **HookEvent count 46Ôćĺ40** ÔÇö removed 6 orphan events: CONTEXT_WARNING, PROMPT_DRIFT_DETECTED, GATEWAY_MESSAGE/RESPONSE, MCP_SERVER_STARTED/STOPPED.

## [0.35.0] ÔÇö 2026-03-29

### Added
- **SharedServices Gateway** ÔÇö single factory for all session modes (REPL/DAEMON/SCHEDULER/FORK). Codex CLI `ThreadManagerState` + OpenClaw Gateway pattern. `create_session(mode)` guarantees identical shared resources across all entry points.
- **SessionMode enum** ÔÇö `REPL` (hitl=2, interactive), `DAEMON` (hitl=0, Slack/Discord), `SCHEDULER` (hitl=0, 300s cap), `FORK` (hitl=0, 60s cap).

### Changed
- **Time-based constraints** ÔÇö `DEFAULT_MAX_ROUNDS=0` (unlimited) for all modes. `time_budget_s` is the sole execution constraint. `ChannelBinding.max_rounds` replaced by `time_budget_s` (120s default). Legacy `max_rounds` config auto-converted.
- **GATEWAY Ôćĺ DAEMON** ÔÇö external channel poller mode renamed to `DAEMON`. "Gateway" now refers to the SharedServices layer.

### Fixed
- **HookSystem wired** ÔÇö `build_hooks()` called at bootstrap, injected into every `create_session()`. `_fire_hook()` now works (was permanently None).
- **Globals Ôćĺ ContextVar** ÔÇö `_project_memory`, `_user_profile`, `_readiness` converted from module-level globals to `ContextVar`. Thread-safe across DAEMON/SCHEDULER threads.
- **Scheduler ContextVar propagation** ÔÇö `propagate_context=True` in `create_session(SCHEDULER)` re-injects domain/memory/profile before job execution.

### Architecture
- **5 Shared Services GAPs resolved** ÔÇö HookSystem(CRITICALÔćĺfixed), globals(HIGHÔćĺfixed), scheduler propagation(HIGHÔćĺfixed), _readiness(MEDIUMÔćĺfixed), _result_cache(LOWÔćĺalready had Lock).

## [0.34.0] ÔÇö 2026-03-29

### Added
- **Sub-Agent Subprocess Isolation** ÔÇö `WorkerRequest`/`WorkerResult` ŰŹ░ýŁ┤Ýä░ ŕ│äýĽŻ + `core.agent.worker` subprocess worker. IsolatedRunnerŕ░Ç callable(thread) / WorkerRequest(subprocess) ý×ÉŰĆÖ ŰŁ╝ýÜ░Ýîů. ÝüČŰ×śýőť ŕ▓ęŰŽČ + SIGKILL timeout.
- **3-Entry-Point ŰŽČýćîýŐĄ ŕ│Áýťá ŕ░ÉýéČ** ÔÇö REPL/serve/scheduler ýáäý▓┤ ŰŽČýćîýŐĄ ŰžÁ ýőťŕ░üÝÖö + 5ŕ▒┤ ŕ▓░ÝĽĘ ýőŁŰ│ä.

### Changed
- **Sub-Agent max_depth 2Ôćĺ1** ÔÇö Claude Code ÝîĘÝä┤ ýáĽÝĽę. ýäťŰŞîýŚÉýŁ┤ýáäÝŐŞ ý×ČŕĚÇ ŕŞłýžÇ.
- **IsolatedRunner Semaphore Wait** ÔÇö ýŽëýőť ŕ▒░ŰÂÇ(0s) Ôćĺ ŰîÇŕŞ░(30s). ŰĆÖýőťýä▒ ýáťýľ┤ ŕ░ťýäá.

### Changed
- **LLM-consumed documents English conversion** ÔÇö All 39 files injected into LLM context (GEODE.md, CLAUDE.md, definitions.json, SKILL.md ├Ś30, rules ├Ś4, PROJECT.md, decomposer.md) converted to English. Korean trigger keywords retained for bilingual input matching. Added i18n convention rule to CLAUDE.md (#523).

### Architecture
- **Shared Services GAP ýőŁŰ│ä** ÔÇö HookSystem Ű»ŞýŚ░ŕ▓░(CRITICAL), module-level globals ýŐĄŰáłŰôť Ű╣äýĽłýáä(HIGH), ContextVar Ű»ŞýáäÝîî(HIGH), _readiness ŰáłýŁ┤ýŐĄ(MEDIUM), _result_cache ýÂęŰĆî(LOW). ŰőĄýŁî Ű▓äýáäýŚÉýäť ýłśýáĽ ýśłýáĽ.

## [0.31.0] ÔÇö 2026-03-28

### Added
- **Action Summary (Tier 1)** --- AgenticLoop Ýä┤ ýóůŰúî ýőť ŕ░ťŰ│ä ŰĆäŕÁČ ÝśŞýÂť + ŕ▓░ŕ│╝Űą╝ ŕ▓░ýáĽŰíáýáüýť╝Űíť ýÜöýĽŻ ÝĹťýőť. `AgenticResult.summary` ÝĽäŰôťýŚÉ ýáÇý×ą. ÝćáÝü░ Ű╣äýÜę 0.
- **Gateway binding hot-reload** --- `ConfigWatcher` watches `.geode/config.toml` and reloads `ChannelManager` bindings on file change (OpenClaw hot-reload pattern). No restart required.
- **L4 webhook endpoint** --- `geode serve` optionally starts an HTTP POST endpoint (`/webhook`, default port 8765) that triggers AgenticLoop execution from external systems (OpenClaw L4 Gateway Hooks pattern). Controlled by `GEODE_WEBHOOK_ENABLED` / `GEODE_WEBHOOK_PORT` settings.
- **TOOL_APPROVAL hooks** --- `TOOL_APPROVAL_REQUESTED`, `TOOL_APPROVAL_GRANTED`, `TOOL_APPROVAL_DENIED` 3ýóů HookEvent ýÂöŕ░Ç (42 -> 45). HITL ýŐ╣ýŁŞ/ŕ▒░ŰÂÇ/Always ÝîĘÝä┤ ýÂöýáü. `ToolExecutor`ýŚÉ hooks ýú╝ý×ů, `bootstrap.py`ýŚÉ `approval_tracker`/`denial_logger` ÝĽŞŰôĄŰčČ Űô▒ŰíŁ.

### Fixed
- **TOOL_APPROVAL ýŁ┤Ű▓ĄÝŐŞŰ¬ů ŰÂłýŁ╝ý╣ś ýłśýáĽ** ÔÇö `tool_approval_decided` Ôćĺ `tool_approval_granted`/`tool_approval_denied` ŰÂäŰŽČ. ýŁ┤ýáä ýŻöŰôťýŚÉýäť `_emit_hook("tool_approval_decided")`ŕ░Ç HookEventýŚÉ ýŚćýľ┤ ValueError ýé╝Ýé┤ Ôćĺ ýőĄýáť Ű░ťÝÖö ýĽł ŰÉśŰŐö Ű▓äŕĚŞ ÝĽ┤ýćî.
- **LLM_CALL_START / LLM_CALL_END hooks** ÔÇö LLM ÝśŞýÂť ýáäÝŤä Ű░ťÝÖöŰíť model-level latency/cost observability ýáťŕ│Á. `call_llm()`, `call_llm_with_tools()` ŕ│äýŞí. 10ý┤ł ý┤łŕ│╝ ýőť slow call ŕ▓Żŕ│á Űíťŕ╣ů. Hook 42ŕ░ť.
- **SESSION_START / SESSION_END hooks** ÔÇö REPL ýäŞýůś ýőťý×Ĺ/ýóůŰúî ýőť Ű░ťÝÖö (OpenClaw `agent:bootstrap` ÝîĘÝä┤).
- **CONTEXT_OVERFLOW_ACTION hook** ÔÇö ýĽĽýÂĽ ýáäŰ×ÁýŁä Hook ÝĽŞŰôĄŰčČŕ░Ç ŕ▓░ýáĽ. `trigger_with_result()`Űíť ÝĽŞŰôĄŰčČ Ű░śÝÖśŕ░ĺ Ýö╝ŰôťŰ░▒. `context_action.py` ŕŞ░Ű│Ş ÝĽŞŰôĄŰčČ ýáťŕ│Á.
- **Scheduler action queue** ÔÇö `ScheduledJob.action` ÝĽäŰôť ýÂöŕ░Ç. ýŤÉŰČŞ ÝůŹýŐĄÝŐŞŰą╝ ŕĚŞŰîÇŰíť ýáÇý×ą(ýáĽŕĚťýőŁ ýÂöýÂť ýáťŕ▒░). `SchedulerService`ŕ░Ç job Ű░ťÝÖö ýőť `action_queue`ýŚÉ ýéŻý×ů. REPLýŁ┤ `[scheduled-job:{id}]` ÝöäŰáłýŁ┤Ű░Źýť╝Űíť AgenticLoopýŚÉ ýťäý×ä ÔÇö LLMýŁ┤ ý×Éý▓┤ ÝîÉŰőĘýť╝Űíť ýŐĄý╝ÇýĄä ýŁśŰĆäŰą╝ ŰÂäŰŽČÝĽśýŚČ ýőĄÝľë.
- **Cron ýäŞýůś ŕ▓ęŰŽČ** ÔÇö `ScheduledJob.isolated` ÝĽäŰôť ýÂöŕ░Ç (ŕŞ░Ű│Şŕ░ĺ `True`). OpenClaw `agentTurn` ÝîĘÝä┤: ýŐĄý╝ÇýĄä Ű░ťÝÖö ýőť fresh ConversationContext + AgenticLoopýŚÉýäť ŰĆůŰŽŻ ýőĄÝľëÝĽśýŚČ ŰęöýŁŞ ŰîÇÝÖö ýśĄýŚ╝ Ű░ęýžÇ. `isolated=False`(systemEvent)Űíť ŰęöýŁŞ ýäŞýůś ýú╝ý×ůŰĆä ŕ░ÇŰŐą.
- **TURN_COMPLETE ý×ÉŰĆÖ ŰęöŰ¬ĘŰŽČ** ÔÇö 37Ű▓łýžŞ HookEvent. AgenticLoop ŰžĄ Ýä┤ ýóůŰúî ýőť Ű░ťÝÖö, user_input + tool_calls + result ŰŹ░ýŁ┤Ýä░ ýáäŰőČ. `turn_auto_memory` ÝĽŞŰôĄŰčČŕ░Ç ý×ÉŰĆÖýť╝Űíť project memoryýŚÉ Ýä┤ ýÜöýĽŻ ŕŞ░ŰíŁ (OpenClaw `command:new` ÝîĘÝä┤).
- **OpenAI Responses API ýáäÝÖś** ÔÇö `OpenAIAgenticAdapter`Űą╝ Chat Completions Ôćĺ Responses API(`client.responses.create`)Űíť ŰžłýŁ┤ŕĚŞŰáłýŁ┤ýůś. ŰäĄýŁ┤Ýő░ŰŞî `web_search` ÝśŞýŐĄÝő░Űôť ŰĆäŕÁČ ýú╝ý×ů. `normalize_openai_responses()` ýáĽŕĚťÝÖöŕŞ░ ýÂöŕ░Ç.
- **3ýéČ ŰäĄýŁ┤Ýő░ŰŞî ýŤ╣ ŕ▓Çýâë fallback** ÔÇö `GeneralWebSearchTool`/`WebSearchTool`ýŁä Anthropic(Opus) Ôćĺ OpenAI(gpt-5.4) Ôćĺ GLM(glm-5) ýłťý░Ę fallbackýť╝Űíť ýáäÝÖś. ýÖŞŰÂÇ API ÝéĄ ýŁśýí┤ ýáťŰíť.

### Removed
- **Brave Search MCP ýáťŕ▒░** ÔÇö `brave_adapter.py` ýéşýáť, catalog/registry/mcp_servers.jsonýŚÉýäť brave-search ÝĽşŰ¬ę ýáťŕ▒░. 3ýéČ ŰäĄýŁ┤Ýő░ŰŞî ýŤ╣ ŕ▓Çýâëýť╝Űíť ŰîÇý▓┤.
- **Twitter MCP ý╣┤ÝâłŰíťŕĚŞ ýáťŕ▒░** ÔÇö $200/ýŤö ŰČ┤ŰúîÝĽťŰĆä ýŚćŰŐö ýäťŰ╣äýŐĄ Ű╣äýÂöý▓ť Ôćĺ ýéşýáť.

### Infrastructure
- **`openai>=2.26.0`** + **`openai-agents>=0.13.0`** ýŁśýí┤ýä▒ ýÂöŕ░Ç (Responses API ýžÇýŤÉ).

### Architecture
- **ContextVar DI ýáĽŰŽČ** ÔÇö ŰÂłÝĽäýÜöÝĽť ContextVar 8ŕ░ť ýáťŕ▒░. ŰőĘýŁ╝ ýćîŰ╣äý×É┬ĚŰĆÖýŁ╝ ÝîîýŁ╝ Űé┤ ýáĹŕĚ╝ýŁŞ ŕ▓ŻýÜ░ module-level Ű│ÇýłśŰíť ŕÁÉý▓┤. dead code `_llm_text_ctx` ýÖäýáä ýéşýáť. `set_*/get_*` API ýťáýžÇŰíť ÝśŞýÂťŰÂÇ Ű│Çŕ▓Ż ýŚćýŁî.
- **`core/fixtures/` ýéşýáť** ÔÇö ýĄĹŰ│Á fixture ŰööŰáëÝä░ŰŽČ ýáťŕ▒░. ýćîŰ╣äý×É 2ŕ││(`core/memory/organization.py`, `core/verification/calibration.py`) import ŕ▓ŻŰíťŰą╝ `core.domains.game_ip.fixtures`Űíť ŕ░▒ýőá. `tests/test_calibration.py` ŕ▓ŻŰíť ŰĆÖŕŞ░ÝÖö.
- **Scaffold skills ŕ▓ŻŰíť ŰÂäŰŽČ** ÔÇö `.geode/skills/` Űé┤ Scaffold 21ýóů(SKILL.md ŕŞ░Ű░ś)ýŁä `.claude/skills/`Űíť ýŁ┤ŰĆÖ. Runtime skills(`geode-analysts/` 4ýóů) ŰŐö `.geode/skills/`ýŚÉ ýťáýžÇ. CLAUDE.md ŕ▓ŻŰíť ŕ░▒ýőá.
- **`core/hooks/` ýőáýäĄ** ÔÇö HookSystem/HookEvent/HookResult + HookPluginLoader + plugins/Űą╝ `core/orchestration/`ýŚÉýäť ŰÂäŰŽČ. Cross-cutting concernýŁ┤Ű»ÇŰíť Ű│äŰĆä ýÁťýâüýťä Ű¬ĘŰôłŰíť. 26ŕ░ť ýćîŰ╣äý×É `from core.hooks import HookSystem` ŕ▓ŻŰíť ÝćÁýŁ╝. L0~L4ŕ░Ç L3(orchestration)ýŚÉ ýŁśýí┤ÝĽśŰŹś ŰáłýŁ┤ýľ┤ ýťäŰ░ś ÝĽ┤ýćî.
- **single-impl Protocol ýáťŕ▒░** ÔÇö `core/memory/port.py`ýŚÉýäť ŕÁČÝśäý▓┤ŕ░Ç ÝĽśŰéśŰ┐ÉýŁŞ `ProjectMemoryPort`, `OrganizationMemoryPort`, `UserProfilePort` ýéşýáť. ýćîŰ╣äý×É(runtime.py, context.py, memory_tools.py, profile_tools.py)ŕ░Ç ŕÁČý▓┤ ÝâÇý×ů(`ProjectMemory`, `MonoLakeOrganizationMemory`, `FileBasedUserProfile`)ýŁä ýžüýáĹ ý░Şýí░. `SessionStorePort`ŰŐö ŰőĄýĄĹ ŕÁČÝśäý▓┤(`InMemorySessionStore`, `HybridSessionStore`)ŕ░Ç ý×łýť╝Ű»ÇŰíť ýťáýžÇ.
- **`calendar_bridge.py` ýŁ┤ŰĆÖ** ÔÇö `core/orchestration/calendar_bridge.py` Ôćĺ `core/automation/calendar_bridge.py`. ýŐĄý╝ÇýĄäŰčČÔćöý║śŰŽ░ŰŹö ŰĆÖŕŞ░ÝÖöŰŐö automation concern.
- **`GeodeRuntime.create()` ŰÂäÝĽ┤** ÔÇö 243ýĄä ÝîęÝćáŰŽČ ŰęöýäťŰôťŰą╝ 4ŕ░ť named sub-builderŰíť ŰÂäŰŽČ: `_build_session_store()`, `_build_llm_adapters()`, `_build_config_watcher()`, `_build_plugins()`. create() 70ýĄäŰíť ýÂĽýćî. ÝîîýŁ╝ 1488 Ôćĺ 1477ýĄä.
- **`runtime.py` 5-module ŰÂäÝĽ┤** ÔÇö 1476ýĄä Ôćĺ 517ýĄä. OpenClaw ÝöîŰčČŕĚŞýŁŞ ÝîĘÝä┤ýť╝Űíť `core/runtime_wiring/` 4ŕ░ť Ű¬ĘŰôł ýÂöýÂť: `bootstrap.py`(345ýĄä, hooks/memory/session/config), `infra.py`(228ýĄä, policies/tools/LLM/auth/lanes), `automation.py`(261ýĄä, L4.5 9 components + hook wiring), `adapters.py`(243ýĄä, MCP signal/notification/calendar/gateway). GeodeRuntime Ýü┤Ű×śýŐĄ + dataclass + instance methodsŰžî runtime.pyýŚÉ ý×öŰąś. ŕŞ░ýí┤ import ŕ▓ŻŰíť backward compat ýťáýžÇ.

- **`core/utils/atomic_io.py`** ÔÇö `infrastructure/atomic_io.py`Űą╝ canonical ýťäý╣śŰíť ýŁ┤ŰĆÖ. 9ŕ░ť ýćîŰ╣äý×É ŕ░▒ýőá.

## [0.24.0] ÔÇö 2026-03-22

Slack Gateway ýľĹŰ░ęÝľą ýćîÝćÁ + MCPServerManager ýő▒ŕŞÇÝä┤ + GLM/Failover ýĽłýáĽÝÖö.

### Added
- **`geode serve`** ý╗ĄŰžĘŰôť ÔÇö headless Gateway ŰŹ░Ű¬Č Ű¬ĘŰôť. REPL ýŚćýŁ┤ Slack ÝĆ┤ŰžüŰžî Ű░▒ŕĚŞŰŁ╝ýÜ┤Űôť ýőĄÝľë (`nohup geode serve &`)

- **MCP Ű│ĹŰáČ ýŚ░ŕ▓░** ÔÇö `_connect_all()` ThreadPoolExecutor Ű│ĹŰáČÝÖö. ýłťý░Ę 11├Ś10s(110s) Ôćĺ Ű│ĹŰáČ ~15s
- **Context Overflow Ű░ęýžÇ** ÔÇö `max_tool_result_tokens` ŕŞ░Ű│Ş 4000 ÝÖťýä▒ÝÖö, CRITICAL ýőť tool_result 2000ý×É ýáłýéş, `compact_keep_recent` ýäĄýáĽ ŰůŞýÂť
- **System Prompt Űéáýžť ýú╝ý×ů** ÔÇö `_build_date_context()`Űíť Ýśäý×Č Űéáýžť/ýŚ░ŰĆäŰą╝ ýőťýŐĄÝůť ÝöäŰíČÝöäÝŐŞýŚÉ ŰĆÖýáü ýú╝ý×ů. LLM knowledge cutoff ýŚ░ŰĆä ýśĄŰąś Ű░ęýžÇ
- **Gateway System Suffix** ÔÇö `AgenticLoop`ýŚÉ `system_suffix` ÝîîŰŁ╝Ű»ŞÝä░ ýÂöŕ░Ç. Gateway Ű¬ĘŰôť ýáäýÜę ýőťýŐĄÝůť ÝöäŰíČÝöäÝŐŞ ÝÖĽý×ą
- **@Űęśýůś ýáäýÜę ýŁĹŰőÁ ŕ▓îýŁ┤ÝŐŞ** ÔÇö `_is_mentioned()`ýŚÉ Slack `<@U...>` ÝĆČŰžĚ ŕ░ÉýžÇ + `_strip_mentions()`Űíť Űęśýůś ÝâťŕĚŞ ýáĽŰŽČ + `require_mention=true` ÝÖťýä▒ÝÖö

### Fixed
- **switch_model ÝŹ╝ýžÇ ŰžĄý╣ş** ÔÇö ÝĽśýŁ┤Ýöł/ŕ│ÁŰ░▒/ýľŞŰŹöýŐĄýŻöýľ┤ ýáĽŕĚťÝÖö. "GLM5"Ôćĺ`glm-5`, "gpt5"Ôćĺ`gpt-5.4` Űô▒ ý×ÉýŚ░ýľ┤ Ý×îÝŐŞ ýŁŞýőŁ
- **Slack ŰęöýőťýžÇ ýŚÉýŻö ýáťŕ▒░** ÔÇö Gateway ýŁĹŰőÁ ýőť ýéČýÜęý×É ŰęöýőťýžÇŰą╝ 4ÝÜî Ű░śŰ│Á ýÂťŰáąÝĽśŰŹś ŰČŞýáť. `_GATEWAY_SUFFIX`Űíť ýŚÉýŻö/Ű░śŰ│Á ŕŞłýžÇ ýžÇýőť ýú╝ý×ů
- **ýŤ╣ ŕ▓Çýâë ýŚ░ŰĆä ýśĄŰąś** ÔÇö `GeneralWebSearchTool` description + ŕ▓Çýâë ý┐╝ŰŽČýŚÉ Ýśäý×Č Űéáýžť ŰĆÖýáü Ű░śýśü
- **Slack ý▓śŰŽČ ýĄĹ ýŁŞŰööý╝ÇýŁ┤Ýä░** ÔÇö `_set_reaction()`ýť╝Űíť Ű¬ĘŰ×śýőťŕ│ä ŰŽČýĽíýůś ÝĹťýőť/ýáťŕ▒░
- **Gateway ýľĹŰ░ęÝľą ýćîÝćÁ** ÔÇö SlackPollerŕ░Ç ýťáýáÇ ŰęöýőťýžÇŰą╝ ýłśýőáÝĽśýžÇŰžî ýŁĹŰőÁýŁä Ű│┤Űé┤ýžÇ Ű¬╗ÝĽśŰŹś 5ŕ▒┤ ýłśýáĽ: Űíťŕ╣ů ýäĄýáĽ, oldest ts seeding(ýĄĹŰ│Á Ű░ęýžÇ), ŰęöýőťýžÇŰ│ä ŰĆůŰŽŻ AgenticLoop, ýŚÉŰčČ ŕ░Çýőťýä▒(debugÔćĺwarning)
- **Slack MCP tool ýŁ┤ŰŽä ýáĽÝĽęýä▒** ÔÇö `get_channel_history` Ôćĺ `slack_get_channel_history`, `send_message` Ôćĺ `slack_post_message`, `channel` Ôćĺ `channel_id` ÝîîŰŁ╝Ű»ŞÝä░Ű¬ů
- **NotificationAdapter kwargs ýáäŰőČ** ÔÇö 3ý▒äŰäÉ(Slack/Discord/Telegram) `**kwargs`(thread_ts Űô▒) MCP call argsýŚÉ ÝĆČÝĽĘ + `_parse_mcp_result()` content wrapper Ýîîýő▒
- **GLM base URL** ÔÇö `api.z.ai/v1` Ôćĺ `open.bigmodel.cn/api/paas/v4/` (nginx 404 ÝĽ┤ýćî)
- **httpx keepalive** ÔÇö 15s Ôćĺ 30s (APIConnectionError Ű╣łŰĆä ŕ░Éýćî)

- **MCP ÝůîýŐĄÝŐŞ ŕ▓ęŰŽČ** ÔÇö global .env Path.home() mockýť╝Űíť ÝÖśŕ▓Ż ŰĆůŰŽŻýä▒ ÝÖĽŰ│┤

## [0.23.0] ÔÇö 2026-03-22

P1 Gateway ýľ┤ŰîĹÝä░ ÝîĘÝä┤ ÔÇö ŰęÇÝő░ÝöäŰíťŰ░öýŁ┤ŰŹö LLM ýĽłýáĽÝÖö.

### Architecture
- **P1 Gateway Adapter Pattern** ÔÇö AgenticLoop ýŁŞŰŁ╝ýŁŞ ÝöäŰíťŰ░öýŁ┤ŰŹö ýŻöŰôťŰą╝ `AgenticLLMPort` Protocol + 3ŕ░ť ýľ┤ŰîĹÝä░(Claude/OpenAI/GLM)Űíť ŰÂäŰŽČ. `agentic_loop.py` 1720Ôćĺ1378ýĄä (-342ýĄä)
- **Adapter Registry** ÔÇö `resolve_agentic_adapter()` ŰĆÖýáü ý×äÝĆČÝŐŞ. ÝöäŰíťŰ░öýŁ┤ŰŹö ýÂöŕ░Ç ýőť ŰőĘýŁ╝ ÝîîýŁ╝Űíť ÝĽ┤ŕ▓░
- **Cross-provider Fallback** ÔÇö GLMÔćĺOpenAIÔćĺAnthropic ŰőĄŰőĘ ÝÄśýŁ╝ýśĄŰ▓ä (ŕŞ░ýí┤ GLMÔćĺOpenAIŰžî)

### Added
- **System Prompt Űéáýžť ýú╝ý×ů** ÔÇö `_build_date_context()`Űíť Ýśäý×Č Űéáýžť/ýŚ░ŰĆäŰą╝ ýőťýŐĄÝůť ÝöäŰíČÝöäÝŐŞýŚÉ ŰĆÖýáü ýú╝ý×ů. LLM knowledge cutoff(2025)Űíť ýŁŞÝĽť ŕ▓Çýâë ýŚ░ŰĆä ýśĄŰąś Ű░ęýžÇ
- **Gateway System Suffix** ÔÇö `AgenticLoop`ýŚÉ `system_suffix` ÝîîŰŁ╝Ű»ŞÝä░ ýÂöŕ░Ç. Gateway Ű¬ĘŰôťýŚÉýäť ý▒äŰäÉŰ│ä ýőťýŐĄÝůť ÝöäŰíČÝöäÝŐŞ ÝÖĽý×ą ŕ░ÇŰŐą

### Fixed
- **Slack Gateway ŰęöýőťýžÇ ýŚÉýŻö ýáťŕ▒░** ÔÇö Slack ýŁĹŰőÁ ýőť ýéČýÜęý×É ŰęöýőťýžÇŰą╝ 4ÝÜî Ű░śŰ│Á ýÂťŰáąÝĽśŰŹś ŰČŞýáť. `_GATEWAY_SUFFIX`Űíť ýŚÉýŻö/Ű░śŰ│Á ŕŞłýžÇ ýžÇýőť ýú╝ý×ů
- **ýŤ╣ ŕ▓Çýâë ýŚ░ŰĆä ýśĄŰąś** ÔÇö `GeneralWebSearchTool` description + ŕ▓Çýâë ý┐╝ŰŽČýŚÉ Ýśäý×Č Űéáýžť ŰĆÖýáü Ű░śýśü
- **Slack ý▓śŰŽČ ýĄĹ ýŁŞŰööý╝ÇýŁ┤Ýä░** ÔÇö `_set_reaction()`ýť╝Űíť Ű¬ĘŰ×śýőťŕ│ä ŰŽČýĽíýůś ÝĹťýőť/ýáťŕ▒░
- GLM Round 2+ `messages[].content[0].typeš▒╗ň×őÚöÖŔ»»` ÔÇö AnthropicÔćĺOpenAI ŰęöýőťýžÇ ÝĆČŰžĚ Ű│ÇÝÖś ŰłäŰŁŻ
- KeyboardInterruptŕ░Ç Ű¬ĘŰŹŞ ýŚÉýŐĄý╗ČŰáłýŁ┤ýůśýŁä ÝŐŞŰŽČŕ▒░ÝĽśŰŹś ŰČŞýáť ÔÇö `UserCancelledError` ŰÂäŰŽČ
- OpenAI/GLM httpx ý╗ĄŰäąýůś ÝĺÇ Ű»ŞýäĄýáĽ ÔÇö Anthropicŕ│╝ ŰĆÖýŁ╝ ýäĄýáĽ (20conn, 30s keepalive) ýáüýÜę
- GLM CircuitBreaker ŰÂÇý×Č ÔÇö OpenAI ýľ┤ŰîĹÝä░ýŚÉýäť ýâüýćŹ

## [0.22.0] ÔÇö 2026-03-21

Sandbox Hardening + REODE ý×ÉýťĘ ýÜ┤Ýľë ÝĽśŰäĄýŐĄ ÝîĘÝä┤ ýŚşýłśý×ů + Ýĺłýžł ýŐĄÝéČ ÝĆČÝîů.

### Added

#### Sandbox Hardening
- PolicyChain L1-2 ýÖÇýŁ┤ýľ┤Űžü ÔÇö `load_profile_policy()` + `load_org_policy()` Ôćĺ `build_6layer_chain()`ýť╝Űíť Profile/Org/Mode ÝćÁÝĽę ý▓┤ýŁŞ ŕÁČýä▒
- SubAgent Tool Scope ÔÇö `denied_tools` ÝîîŰŁ╝Ű»ŞÝä░ + `SUBAGENT_DENIED_TOOLS` ýâüýłś (6ŕ░ť Ű»╝ŕ░É ŰĆäŕÁČ ýäťŰŞîýŚÉýŁ┤ýáäÝŐŞ ýáĹŕĚ╝ ý░ĘŰőĘ)
- Bash Resource Limits ÔÇö `preexec_fn`ýť╝Űíť `resource.setrlimit` ýáüýÜę (CPU 30s, FSIZE 50MB, NPROC 64)
- Secret Redaction ÔÇö `core/cli/redaction.py` ýőáŕĚť, 8ŕ░ť API ÝéĄ ÝîĘÝä┤(Anthropic/OpenAI/ZhipuAI/GitHub/Slack) ŕ░ÉýžÇ Ű░Ć ŰžłýŐĄÝé╣, BashTool + MCP tool resultýŚÉ ý×ÉŰĆÖ ýáüýÜę

#### Harness Patterns (REODE ýŚşýłśý×ů)
- Session-level tool approval (A=Always) ÔÇö HITL ÝöäŰíČÝöäÝŐŞýŚÉ `[Y/n/A]` ýśÁýůś, ýäŞýůś ŰĆÖýĽł ý╣┤Ýůîŕ│áŰŽČŰ│ä ý×ÉŰĆÖ ýŐ╣ýŁŞ
- HITL Level (0/1/2) ÔÇö `GEODE_HITL_LEVEL` ÝÖśŕ▓ŻŰ│Çýłś (0=ý×ÉýťĘ, 1=WRITEŰžî ŰČ╗ŕŞ░, 2=ýáäŰÂÇ ŰČ╗ŕŞ░)
- Model Escalation ÔÇö LLM ýŚ░ýćŹ 2ÝÜî ýőĄÝîĘ ýőť fallback chain ŰőĄýŁî Ű¬ĘŰŹŞ ý×ÉŰĆÖ ýáäÝÖś
- Cross-Provider Escalation ÔÇö provider chain ýćîýžä ýőť secondary providerŰíť ý×ÉŰĆÖ ýáäÝÖś (anthropicÔćöopenai, glmÔćĺopenai)
- Backpressure ÔÇö tool ýŚ░ýćŹ 3ÝÜî ýŚÉŰčČ ýőť 1s ý┐ĘŰőĄýÜ┤ + "ŰőĄŰąŞ ýáĹŕĚ╝ ŕ│áŰáĄ" Ý×îÝŐŞ ýú╝ý×ů
- Convergence Detection ÔÇö ŰĆÖýŁ╝ ýŚÉŰčČ 4ÝÜî Ű░śŰ│Á Ôćĺ `convergence_detected`Űíť ŰúĘÝöä ý×ÉŰĆÖ ýĄĹŰőĘ
- Model-first Provider Inference ÔÇö `_resolve_provider()` ŕ░ĽÝÖö (gpt/o3/o4Ôćĺopenai, geminiÔćĺgoogle, deepseekÔćĺdeepseek, llamaÔćĺmeta, qwenÔćĺalibaba)

#### Skills (REODE ýŚşýłśý×ů)
- `explore-reason-act` ÔÇö ýŻöŰôť ýłśýáĽ ýáä ÝâÉýâë-ýÂöŰíá-ýőĄÝľë 3ŰőĘŕ│ä ýŤîÝüČÝöîŰíťýÜ░
- `anti-deception-checklist` ÔÇö ŕ░Çýžť ýä▒ŕ│Á Ű░ęýžÇ 5-check ŕ▓ÇýŽŁ
- `code-review-quality` ÔÇö Python 6-ŰáîýŽł ýŻöŰôť Ýĺłýžł ŰŽČŰĚ░
- `dependency-review` ÔÇö GEODE 6-Layer ýŁśýí┤ýä▒ ŕ▒┤ýáäýä▒ ŰŽČŰĚ░
- `kent-beck-review` ÔÇö Simple Design 4ŕĚťý╣Ö ýŻöŰôť ŰŽČŰĚ░

### Changed
- README ýśłýőť ŰŽČŰë┤ýľ╝ ÔÇö ŕ▓îý×ä IP ýĄĹýőČ ýśłýőťŰą╝ Ű▓öýÜę ŰŽČýäťý╣ś ýŚÉýŁ┤ýáäÝŐŞ ý×ÉýŚ░ýľ┤ ý┐╝ŰŽČŰíť ŕÁÉý▓┤. Quick Start REPL ýÜ░ýäá, ý×ÉýŚ░ýľ┤ ý×ůŰáą ýśłýőť 7ýóů ýÂöŕ░Ç, Game IPŰŐö Domain Plugin ÝĽśýťäŰíť ýŁ┤ŰĆÖ

ý×ÉýťĘ ýőĄÝľë ŕ░ĽÝÖö ÔÇö Signal Liveification, Plan ý×ÉýťĘ ýőĄÝľë, Dynamic Graph, ýáüýŁĹÝśĽ ýśĄŰąś Ű│ÁŕÁČ, Goal Decomposition, ýŚÉýŁ┤ýáäÝŐŞ ŕĚŞŰŁ╝ýÜ┤Űöę ÝŐŞŰúĘýŐĄ.

- ýäťŰŞîýŚÉýŁ┤ýáäÝŐŞ ŕ▓░ŕ│╝ ýłśýžĹ `as_completed` ÝîĘÝä┤ ÔÇö ýłťý░Ę ŰŞöŰíťÝé╣ Ôćĺ polling round-robin ýáäÝÖś. ŰĘ╝ýáÇ ŰüŁŰéť ÝâťýŐĄÝüČýŁś SUBAGENT_COMPLETED ÝŤůýŁ┤ ýŽëýőť Ű░ťÝľë

### Added
- HITL ýŐ╣ýŁŞ ÝŤä ýŐĄÝö╝Űäł ÔÇö `_tool_spinner()` ý╗ĘÝůŹýŐĄÝŐŞ ŰžĄŰőłýáÇŰíť bash/MCP/write/expensive ŰĆäŕÁČ ýőĄÝľë ýĄĹ `Ôťó` dots ýŐĄÝö╝Űäł ÝĹťýőť, ýŐ╣ýŁŞ ŕ▒░ŰÂÇ┬ĚSafe/Standard ŰĆäŕÁČýŚÉŰŐö Ű»ŞÝĹťýőť
- Signal Liveification ÔÇö MCP ŕŞ░Ű░ś ŰŁ╝ýŁ┤ŰŞî ýőťŕĚŞŰäÉ ýłśýžĹ (`CompositeSignalAdapter` Ôćĺ `SteamMCPSignalAdapter` + `BraveSignalAdapter`), fixture fallback Ű│┤ýí┤, `signal_source` ÝĽäŰôťŰíť provenance ýÂöýáü
- Plan ý×ÉýťĘ ýőĄÝľë Ű¬ĘŰôť ÔÇö `GEODE_PLAN_AUTO_EXECUTE=true`Űíť ŕ│äÝÜŹ ýâŁýä▒ÔćĺýŐ╣ýŁŞÔćĺýőĄÝľëýŁä ýéČýÜęý×É ŕ░ťý×ů ýŚćýŁ┤ ý×ÉŰĆÖ ýłśÝľë, step ýőĄÝîĘ ýőť ý×ČýőťŰĆä 1ÝÜî ÝŤä partial successŰíť ŕ│äýćŹ ýžäÝľë (`PlanExecutionMode.AUTO`)
- Dynamic Graph ÔÇö ŰÂäýäŁ ŕ▓░ŕ│╝ýŚÉ Űö░ŰŁ╝ ŰůŞŰôť ŰĆÖýáü ŕ▒┤ŰäłŰŤ░ŕŞ░/enrichment ŕ▓ŻŰíť ŰÂäŕŞ░ (`skip_nodes`, `skipped_nodes`, `enrichment_needed` state ÝĽäŰôť + `skip_check` ýí░ŕ▒┤ŰÂÇ ŰůŞŰôť)
- ýáüýŁĹÝśĽ ýśĄŰąś Ű│ÁŕÁČ ýőťýŐĄÝůť ÔÇö `ErrorRecoveryStrategy` ýáäŰ×Á ÝîĘÝä┤ (retry Ôćĺ alternative Ôćĺ fallback Ôćĺ escalate), 2ÝÜî ýŚ░ýćŹ ýőĄÝîĘ ýőť ý×ÉŰĆÖ Ű│ÁŕÁČ ý▓┤ýŁŞ ýőĄÝľë, DANGEROUS/WRITE ŰĆäŕÁČ ýĽłýáä ŕ▓îýŁ┤ÝŐŞ Ű│┤ýí┤
- `TOOL_RECOVERY_ATTEMPTED`/`SUCCEEDED`/`FAILED` HookEvent 3ýóů ÔÇö ýśĄŰąś Ű│ÁŕÁČ ýłśŰ¬ůýú╝ŕŞ░ ŕ┤ÇýŞíýä▒ (HookSystem 30 events)
- ý×ÉýťĘ Ű¬ęÝĹť ŰÂäÝĽ┤ (Goal Decomposition) ÔÇö `GoalDecomposer` Ýü┤Ű×śýŐĄŰíť ŕ│áýłśýĄÇ Ű│ÁÝĽę ýÜöý▓şýŁä ÝĽśýťä Ű¬ęÝĹť DAGŰíť ý×ÉŰĆÖ ŰÂäÝĽ┤. Haiku Ű¬ĘŰŹŞ ýéČýÜęýť╝Űíť Ű╣äýÜę ýÁťýćîÝÖö (~$0.01/ÝśŞýÂť). ŰőĘýłť ýÜöý▓şýŁÇ Ýť┤ŰŽČýŐĄÝő▒ýť╝Űíť LLM ÝśŞýÂť ýŚćýŁ┤ ÝîĘýŐĄýŐĄŰúĘ
- LinkedIn MCP ýľ┤ŰîĹÝä░ ÔÇö `LinkedInPort` Protocol + `LinkedInMCPAdapter` ŕÁČÝśä (Port/Adapter ÝîĘÝä┤, graceful degradation)
- ŰĆäŕÁČ ý╣┤Ýůîŕ│áŰŽČ/Ű╣äýÜę Ýâťŕ╣ů ÔÇö `definitions.json` ýáä 38ŕ░ť ŰĆäŕÁČýŚÉ `category`(8ýóů)ýÖÇ `cost_tier`(3ýóů) ŰęöÝâÇŰŹ░ýŁ┤Ýä░ ýÂöŕ░Ç, `ToolRegistry.get_tools_by_category()`/`get_tools_by_cost_tier()` ÝĽäÝä░Űžü ŰęöýäťŰôť
- MCP ýäťŰ▓äŰ│ä ýäŞýůś ýŐ╣ýŁŞ ý║Éýőť ÔÇö ÝĽť ýäťŰ▓ä ýÁťý┤ł ýŐ╣ýŁŞ ÝŤä ŰĆÖýŁ╝ ýäŞýůś Űé┤ ý×ČýŐ╣ýŁŞ ýâŁŰ×Á (`_mcp_approved_servers`)
- ýŚÉýŁ┤ýáäÝŐŞ ŕĚŞŰŁ╝ýÜ┤Űöę ÝŐŞŰúĘýŐĄ ÔÇö AGENTIC_SUFFIXýŚÉ Citation & Grounding ŕĚťý╣Ö ýÂöŕ░Ç (ýÂťý▓ś ýŁŞýÜę ŕ░Ľýáť, Ű»ŞÝÖĽýŁŞ ýáĽŰ│┤ ýâŁýä▒ ŕŞłýžÇ)

#### Agentic Loop ŕ░Ľŕ▒┤ýä▒
- `max_rounds` 7Ôćĺ15, `max_tokens` 4096Ôćĺ8192
- `WRAP_UP_HEADROOM=2` ÔÇö ŰžłýžÇŰžë 2ŰŁ╝ýÜ┤ŰôťýŚÉýäť ÝůŹýŐĄÝŐŞ ýŁĹŰőÁ ŕ░Ľýáť
- ýŚ░ýćŹ ýőĄÝîĘ ý×ÉŰĆÖ ýŐĄÝéÁ ÔÇö ŕ░ÖýŁÇ ŰĆäŕÁČ 2ÝÜî ýŚ░ýćŹ ýőĄÝîĘ ýőť ý×ÉŰĆÖ ýŐĄÝéÁ

#### Domain Plugin Architecture (Phase 1-4)
- `DomainPort` Protocol ÔÇö ŰĆäŰęöýŁŞŰ│ä analysts, evaluators, scoring weights, decision tree, prompts ÝöîŰčČŕĚŞýŁŞ ýŁŞÝä░ÝÄśýŁ┤ýŐĄ
- `GameIPDomain` ýľ┤ŰîĹÝä░ ÔÇö ŕŞ░ýí┤ ŕ▓îý×ä IP ÝĆëŕ░Ç ŰíťýžüýŁä DomainPort ŕÁČÝśäý▓┤Űíť ý║íýŐÉÝÖö
- `load_domain_adapter()` / `set_domain()` ÔÇö ŰĆäŰęöýŁŞ ýľ┤ŰîĹÝä░ ŰĆÖýáü ŰíťŰöę + contextvars DI
- `GeodeRuntime.create(domain_name=)` ÔÇö Űč░ÝâÇý×ä ýâŁýä▒ ýőť ŰĆäŰęöýŁŞ ýľ┤ŰîĹÝä░ ý×ÉŰĆÖ ýÖÇýŁ┤ýľ┤Űžü

#### Clarification ýőťýŐĄÝůť ÝÖĽý×ą (3/33 Ôćĺ 25/33 ÝĽŞŰôĄŰčČ)
- `_clarify()` ÝĹťýĄÇ ýŁĹŰőÁ ÝŚČÝŹ╝, `_safe_delegate()` Ű×śÝŹ╝, `MAX_CLARIFICATION_ROUNDS = 3`

#### LLM Cost Tracking (3ŕ│äýŞÁ)
- Real-time UI `render_tokens()`, Session summary, `/cost` Ű¬ůŰá╣ýľ┤

#### Whisking UI
- `GeodeStatus._format_spinner()` ÔÇö Claude Code ýŐĄÝâÇýŁ╝ ŰŁ╝ýŁ┤ŰŞî ýŐĄÝö╝Űäł

### Changed
- ŰŞîŰ×ťŰôť ÝîöŰáłÝŐŞ ÝćÁÝĽę: Coral/Gold/Cyan/Magenta/Crystal Ôćĺ GEODE_THEME ýáäýŚş ýáüýÜę
- `_normalise_mcp_tool()` ÔÇö MCP camelCase(`inputSchema`) Ôćĺ Anthropic snake_case(`input_schema`) ýáĽŕĚťÝÖö
- LangGraph API ÝśŞýÂť ýőť `_mcp_server` Űô▒ Űé┤ŰÂÇ ŰęöÝâÇŰŹ░ýŁ┤Ýä░ ÝĽäŰôť ý×ÉŰĆÖ ýáťŕ▒░
- Ű▓äýáä ÝĹťŕŞ░ 0.9.0 Ôćĺ 0.10.1 ýáäŰę┤ ŕ░▒ýőá (`core/__init__`, CLI help, Typer callback)

### Fixed
- MCP ŰĆäŕÁČ `input_schema: Field required` API 400 ýŚÉŰčČ (camelCaseÔćĺsnake_case Ű│ÇÝÖś ŰłäŰŁŻ)

#### NL Router ŕ░ťýäá (PR #32)

- Fuzzy IP matching ÔÇö `difflib.get_close_matches` ("Bersek" Ôćĺ "Berserk")

- Disambiguation ÔÇö `NLIntent.ambiguous` + `alternatives` ÝĽäŰôť

- `assets/geode-mascot.png` ÔÇö GEODE ŰžłýŐĄýŻöÝŐŞ (ÝîîŰ×Ç ŕÁČý▓┤ ŰĹÉŕÁČ ýÜ░ÝîîŰúĘÝîî)

### Changed
- Tool count: 21 Ôćĺ 31 (definitions.json)

- CLI ŰŞîŰ×ťŰöę: "Undervalued IP Discovery Agent" Ôćĺ "ŕ▓îý×äÝÖö IP ŰĆäŰęöýŁŞ ý×ÉýťĘ ýőĄÝľë ÝĽśŰäĄýŐĄ"
- 7ŕ░ť Response dataclassýŚÉ `to_dict()` ýÂöŕ░Ç ÔÇö None ÝĽäŰôť ýžüŰáČÝÖö ýőť ý×ÉŰĆÖ ýáťýÖŞ
  (AgenticResult, SubResult, IsolationResult, HookResult, TriggerResponse, ParseResult)

- `definitions.json` `generate_report`: `format`/`template` enum ÝîîŰŁ╝Ű»ŞÝä░ ýÂöŕ░Ç, `read_document` ý▓┤ýŁ┤ŰőŁ ýĽłŰé┤
- `cmd_schedule()`: `scheduler_service` ÝîîŰŁ╝Ű»ŞÝä░ ýÂöŕ░Ç

### Fixed
- "Berserk ŰÂäýäŁÝĽśŕ│á Ű╣äŕÁÉÝĽśŕ│á ŰŽČÝĆČÝŐŞ" max_rounds ŰĆäŰőČ Ôćĺ clarification ŰÉśŰČ╗ŕŞ░Űíť ÝĽ┤ŕ▓░

- `docs/plans/tool-mcp-catalog.md` ÔÇö MCP ý╣┤ÝâłŰíťŕĚŞ ŰŽČýäťý╣ś

## [0.8.0] ÔÇö 2026-03-11

Plan/Sub-agent NL integration, Claude Code-style UI, response quality hardening.

### Added

#### Plan & Sub-agent NL Integration
- `create_plan` tool ÔÇö NLŰíť ŰÂäýäŁ ŕ│äÝÜŹ ýâŁýä▒ ("Berserk ŰÂäýäŁ ŕ│äÝÜŹ ýäŞýŤîýĄś")
- `approve_plan` tool ÔÇö ŕ│äÝÜŹ ýŐ╣ýŁŞ Ű░Ć ýőĄÝľë ("ŕ│äÝÜŹ ýŐ╣ýŁŞÝĽ┤")
- `delegate_task` tool ÔÇö ýäťŰŞîýŚÉýŁ┤ýáäÝŐŞ Ű│ĹŰáČ ýťäý×ä ("Ű│ĹŰáČŰíť ý▓śŰŽČÝĽ┤")
- NL Router tool count: 17 Ôćĺ 20 (plan/delegate 3ŕ░ť ýÂöŕ░Ç)
- Offline fallback: plan/delegate regex ÝîĘÝä┤ ýÂöŕ░Ç (LLM ýŚćýŁ┤ ŰĆÖý×Ĺ)

#### Claude Code-style UI
- `core/ui/agentic_ui.py` ÔÇö tool call/result/error/token/plan ŰáîŰŹöŰčČ
- `core/ui/console.py` ÔÇö Rich Console ýő▒ŕŞÇÝćĄ (width=120, GEODE ÝůîŰžł)
- Marker system: `ÔľŞ` tool call, `Ôťô` success, `ÔťŚ` error, `Ôťó` tokens, `ÔŚĆ` plan

#### LangSmith Trace Coverage
- `@_maybe_traceable` added to verification layer: `run_guardrails`, `run_biasbuster`, `run_cross_llm_check`, `check_rights_risk`
- Full pipeline tracing coverage: router Ôćĺ signals Ôćĺ analysts Ôćĺ evaluators Ôćĺ scoring Ôćĺ verification Ôćĺ synthesizer

### Changed
- `AgenticLoop._process_tool_calls()`: `str(result)` Ôćĺ `json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False, default=str)` ÔÇö LLMýŁ┤ Ýîîýő▒ ŕ░ÇŰŐąÝĽť JSON ÝśĽýőŁýť╝Űíť tool ŕ▓░ŕ│╝ ýáäŰőČ
- `snapshot._persist_snapshot()`: `json.dumps(..., default=str)` ÔÇö non-serializable ÝĽäŰôť ýĽłýáä ý▓śŰŽČ
- `snapshot.capture()`: `_sanitize_state()` ýÂöŕ░Ç ÔÇö `_`-prefixed Űé┤ŰÂÇ ÝĽäŰôť ÝĽäÝä░Űžü
- NL Router offline fallback ýłťýäť: plan/delegate ÝîĘÝä┤ýŁä known IP ŰžĄý╣şŰ│┤ŰőĄ ŰĘ╝ýáÇ ŕ▓ÇýéČ

### Fixed
- Offline mode `_run_offline()`: action name("list") Ôćĺ tool name("list_ips") ŰžĄÝĽĹ ŰłäŰŁŻ ýłśýáĽ (`_ACTION_TO_TOOL` dict ýÂöŕ░Ç)
- `_TOOL_ACTION_MAP` ŰłäŰŁŻ: `create_plan`, `approve_plan`, `delegate_task` Ű»ŞŰô▒ŰíŁ Ôćĺ ýÂöŕ░Ç

### Infrastructure
- Test count: 1909+ Ôćĺ 2000+
- Module count: 116 Ôćĺ 118
- `tests/test_agentic_ui.py` (20 tests), plan/delegate NL tests (20 tests)

## [0.7.0] ÔÇö 2026-03-11

Pipeline flexibility improvements (C2-C5), LangSmith observability, orchestration integration.

### Added

#### Pipeline Flexibility (C2-C5)
- **C2**: Analyst types dynamically loaded from YAML (`ANALYST_SPECIFIC.keys()`) ÔÇö add analyst = add YAML key
- **C3**: `interrupt_before` support via `GEODE_INTERRUPT_NODES` env ÔÇö pipeline pauses at specified nodes for user review
- **C4**: Dynamic tool addition via `ToolRegistry` in `AgenticLoop` ÔÇö plugins register tools at runtime
- **C5**: `offline_mode` for `AgenticLoop` ÔÇö regex-based tool routing without LLM (1 deterministic round)

#### LangSmith Observability
- Token tracking: `track_token_usage()` records input/output tokens + cost per LLM call
- `_maybe_traceable` decorator on `AgenticLoop.run()` and `_call_llm()` for RunTree tracing
- Cost calculation with per-model pricing (Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, GPT)
- `UsageAccumulator` for session-level cost aggregation

#### Orchestration Integration
- `SubAgentManager` integration with `TaskGraph`, `HookSystem`, `CoalescingQueue`
- `AgenticLoop` rate limit retry with exponential backoff (3├Ś at 10s/20s/40s)
- Tool handler enrichment: 17 handlers with structured return data

#### Testing & Verification
- `tests/test_e2e_live_llm.py` ÔÇö 13 live E2E scenarios (AgenticLoop, LangSmith, Pipeline, Offline)
- `tests/_live_audit_runner.py` ÔÇö 17-tool parallel audit framework
- 17/17 tool handlers verified via AgenticLoop + Opus 4.6 (live audit PASS)
- `docs/e2e-orchestration-scenarios.md` ÔÇö E2E scenario documentation

#### Documentation
- `docs/as-is-to-be-flexibility.md` ÔÇö C1-C5 AS-IS Ôćĺ TO-BE analysis
- `docs/plans/observability-langsmith-plan.md` ÔÇö LangSmith integration plan
- `.claude/skills/geode-e2e/SKILL.md` ÔÇö E2E testing skill guide

### Changed
- `ANALYST_TYPES`: hardcoded list Ôćĺ `list(ANALYST_SPECIFIC.keys())` (1-line change)
- `AGENTIC_TOOLS`: module-level constant Ôćĺ `get_agentic_tools(registry)` function
- `AgenticLoop.__init__()`: added `tool_registry`, `offline_mode` parameters
- `AgenticLoop._call_llm()`: added retry logic + token tracking
- `compile_graph()`: `interrupt_before` parameter wired from settings
- `ProfileStore` access: `.profiles` Ôćĺ `.list_all()` (mypy fix)

### Fixed
- `ProfileStore.profiles` Ôćĺ `ProfileStore.list_all()` attribute error
- Null-safe `model_dump()` in analyze handler (union-attr mypy error)
- Rate limit exhaustion: 3├Ś retry with exponential backoff prevents transient failures

### Infrastructure
- Test count: 1879 Ôćĺ 1909+ (30 new tests)
- Module count: 115 Ôćĺ 116
- `langsmith` added as optional dependency

---

## [0.6.1] ÔÇö 2026-03-10

Content/code separation + infrastructure hardening. No new user-facing features.

### Changed
- Package structure: `src/geode/` Ôćĺ `core/` (315 files removed, all imports updated)
- Prompt templates: Python strings Ôćĺ 8 `.md` template files with `load_prompt()` loader
- Tool definitions: inline dicts Ôćĺ `core/tools/definitions.json` (19 tools) + `tool_schemas.json` (11 schemas)
- Domain data: hardcoded axes/actions Ôćĺ `evaluator_axes.yaml`, `cause_actions.yaml`
- Report templates: inline strings Ôćĺ `core/extensibility/templates/` (HTML + 2 Markdown)
- Constants: hardcoded values Ôćĺ `pydantic-settings` (`router_model`, `agreement_threshold`, etc.)
- `VALID_AXES_MAP` / `EVALUATOR_TYPES` derived from canonical YAML (SSOT)

### Fixed
- CI: `--cov=geode` Ôćĺ `--cov=core`, 85 test files import path ýłśýáĽ
- Bandit B404/B602: `# nosec` for intentional subprocess in `bash_tool.py`
- 201 fixture JSON files: missing EOF newline

### Infrastructure
- Pre-commit hooks: ruff lint/format, mypy, bandit, standard hooks (local via `uv run`)
- `pre-commit` added as dev dependency
- Test count: 1823 Ôćĺ 1879

---

## [0.6.0] ÔÇö 2026-03-10

Initial release of GEODE ÔÇö Undervalued IP Discovery Agent.
56 commits across 5 development phases.

### Added

#### Core Pipeline (LangGraph StateGraph)
- 7-node pipeline: `router Ôćĺ signals Ôćĺ analyst├Ś4 Ôćĺ evaluator├Ś3 Ôćĺ scoring Ôćĺ verification Ôćĺ synthesizer`
- LangGraph `Send()` API for parallel analyst/evaluator fan-out
- `GeodeState` (TypedDict) with Pydantic validation models
- `GeodeRuntime` ÔÇö production wiring with dependency injection
- Streaming mode (`_execute_pipeline_streaming`) ÔÇö progressive panel rendering

#### Analysis Engine
- 4 Analysts: `game_mechanics`, `player_experience`, `growth_potential`, `discovery`
- Clean Context anchoring prevention (no cross-analyst contamination)
- 3 Evaluators: `quality_judge`, `hidden_value`, `community_momentum`
- 14-Axis Rubric Scoring (PSM Engine)
- 6-weighted composite score ├Ś confidence multiplier Ôćĺ Tier S/A/B/C classification

#### Verification Layer
- Guardrails G1ÔÇôG4 (score bounds, consistency, genre-fit, data quality)
- BiasBuster ÔÇö 6-bias detection (anchoring, genre, recency, popularity, cultural, survivorship)
- Cross-LLM validation (agreement threshold Ôëą 0.67)
- Rights Risk assessment (GAP-5)
- Cause Classification Decision Tree

#### CLI (Typer + Rich)
- Interactive REPL with dual routing: `/command` (deterministic) + free-text (NL Router)
- 16+ slash commands: `/analyze`, `/compare`, `/search`, `/batch`, `/report`, `/model`, `/status`, etc.
- NL Router ÔÇö Claude Opus 4.6 Tool Use (12 tools, autonomous routing)
- 3-stage graceful degradation: LLM Tool Use Ôćĺ offline pattern matching Ôćĺ help fallback
- IP search engine with keyword/genre matching
- Report generation (HTML, JSON, Markdown ├Ś Summary/Detailed/Executive templates)
- Batch analysis with parallel execution and ranking table

#### Agentic Loop (v0.6.0-latest)
- `AgenticLoop` ÔÇö `while(tool_use)` multi-round execution (max 10 rounds)
- `ConversationContext` ÔÇö sliding-window multi-turn history (max 20 turns)
- `ToolExecutor` ÔÇö 17 tool handlers with HITL safety gate
- `BashTool` ÔÇö shell execution with 9 blocked dangerous patterns + user approval
- `SubAgentManager` ÔÇö parallel task delegation via `IsolatedRunner` (MAX_CONCURRENT=5)
- Multi-intent support: sequential tool chaining by LLM decision
- Multi-turn context: pronoun resolution, follow-up queries

#### Memory System (3-Tier)
- Organization Memory (fixtures, immutable)
- Project Memory (`.claude/MEMORY.md`, persistent insights + rules)
- Session Memory (in-memory TTL, conversation context)
- Auto-learning loop: `PIPELINE_END` Ôćĺ insight write-back to `MEMORY.md`
- Rule CRUD: create/update/delete/list analysis rules

#### Infrastructure (Hexagonal Architecture)
- `LLMClientPort` / `ClaudeAdapter` / `OpenAIAdapter` ÔÇö multi-provider LLM
- `SignalEnrichmentPort` ÔÇö market signal adapters
- Prompt caching (Anthropic cache_control)
- Ensemble mode: single / cross-LLM
- MCP Server (FastMCP: 6 tools, 2 resources)
- Auth profile management

#### Orchestration
- `HookSystem` ÔÇö 23 lifecycle events (pipeline, node, analysis, verification, memory, prompt)
- `IsolatedRunner` ÔÇö concurrent execution with timeout + semaphore (MAX_CONCURRENT=5)
- `TaskGraph` ÔÇö DAG-based task dependency tracking
- `StuckDetector` ÔÇö pipeline deadlock detection via hooks
- `LaneQueue` ÔÇö concurrency control lanes
- `RunLog` ÔÇö structured execution logging
- `PlanMode` ÔÇö DRAFT Ôćĺ APPROVED Ôćĺ EXECUTING workflow

#### Tools & Policies
- `ToolRegistry` ÔÇö 24 registered tools with lazy loading
- `PolicyChain` ÔÇö composable tool access policies
- `NodeScopePolicy` ÔÇö per-node tool allowlists
- Tool-augmented analyst paths with node-level retry

#### Automation (L4.5)
- Drift detection and monitoring
- Model registry with promotion lifecycle
- Confidence gating (feedback loop)
- Snapshot capture for reproducibility
- Trigger system (event-driven + cron-based)

### Fixed
- Scoring confidence calculation ÔÇö empty/single/zero-mean edge cases (`7591445`)
- Evaluator fallback defaults `1.0 Ôćĺ 3.0` neutral + CLI type safety (`76e4e30`)
- Session ID wiring into pipeline initial state ÔÇö GAP-001 (`e8fbcfe`)
- Billing error detection with user-friendly message (`d878078`)
- Memory 6 issues from 3-agent quality audit (`4430fd4`)
- API key availability Ôćĺ dry-run mode decision logic (`eeec586`, `8ea0555`)
- CI: bandit false positives, ruff format, mypy errors across 3 fix cycles

### Architecture
- Clean Architecture (Hexagonal) ÔÇö ports/adapters separation
- 6-Layer hierarchy: Foundation Ôćĺ Memory Ôćĺ Agentic Core Ôćĺ Orchestration Ôćĺ Automation Ôćĺ Extensibility
- `src/` layout migration (`bf2bc24`)
- OpenClaw-inspired patterns: Gateway, Session Key, Binding Router, Lane Queue

### Infrastructure
- CI: 5-job pipeline (lint, typecheck, test matrix 3.12/3.13, security, gate)
- Strict `mypy` type checking (zero errors)
- `ruff` linting with S-series security rules
- `bandit` security scanning
- 1,879 tests across 115 modules
- 8 Claude skills + 4 analyst sub-skills
- LangSmith tracing (conditional, via `_maybe_traceable`)
